---
title: "PNAS TOXINS FINAL CODE"
author: "Sohil Malik"
date: "2026-07-02"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Load packages

library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(scales)
library(usmap)
library(viridis)
library(ggrepel)

```

# Step 1: Read in datasets
```{r}
# Schools
public_school <- read.csv("Data/Schools/Public/public_school_combined.csv", 
                           colClasses = c("School_ID" = "character"))

private_school <- read.csv("Data/Schools/Private/private_school_combined.csv",
                           colClasses = c("PPIN" = "character"))

# TRI sites
tri <- read.csv("Data/Pollution Sites/TRI/2024_us.csv",
                colClasses = c("X2..TRIFD" = "character"))

# Superfund sites 
superfund <- read.csv("Data/Pollution Sites/Superfund/superfund_sites_with_coordinates_new.csv",
                      colClasses = c("EPA.ID" = "character"))

# Brownfield sites
brownfield <- read.csv("Data/Pollution Sites/Brownfield/brownfield_sites.csv",
                        colClasses = c("Brownfield_ID" = "character"))

```

# Step 2: Clean and standardize IDs
```{r}
# Public schools
public_school_clean <- public_school %>%
  mutate(
    SCHOOL_ID = trimws(School_ID),
    school_type = "Public"
  )

# Private schools
private_school_clean <- private_school %>%
  mutate(
    SCHOOL_ID = trimws(PPIN),
    school_type = "Private"
  )

# TRI
tri_clean <- tri %>%
  mutate(SITE_ID = trimws(X2..TRIFD)) %>%
  rename(LONGITUDE = X13..LONGITUDE, LATITUDE = X12..LATITUDE)

# Superfund
superfund_clean <- superfund %>%
  mutate(SITE_ID = trimws(EPA.ID)) %>%
  rename(LONGITUDE = LONGITUDE, LATITUDE = LATITUDE)

# Brownfields
brownfield_clean <- brownfield %>%
  mutate(SITE_ID = trimws(Brownfield_ID)) %>%
  rename(LONGITUDE = Longitude, LATITUDE = Latitude)

```

# Step 3: Duplicate checks
```{r}
check_duplicates <- function(df, id_col, label) {
  total_sites <- nrow(df)
  unique_sites <- n_distinct(df[[id_col]])
  
  cat("\n---", label, "---\n")
  cat("Total rows:", total_sites, "\n")
  cat("Unique IDs:", unique_sites, "\n")
  
  if(total_sites == unique_sites) {
    cat("All", label, "sites are unique.\n")
  } else {
    cat("There are duplicates in the", label, "dataset.\n")
    df <- df %>% distinct(.data[[id_col]], .keep_all = TRUE)
  }
  return(df)
}

public_school_clean <- check_duplicates(public_school_clean, "SCHOOL_ID", "Public School")
private_school_clean <- check_duplicates(private_school_clean, "SCHOOL_ID", "Private School")

tri_clean <- check_duplicates(tri_clean, "SITE_ID", "TRI")
superfund_clean <- check_duplicates(superfund_clean, "SITE_ID", "Superfund")
brownfield_clean <- check_duplicates(brownfield_clean, "SITE_ID", "Brownfield")

```

# Step 4: Convert to sf objects
```{r}
# --- 1. Keep raw copies of original datasets ---
tri_raw        <- tri_clean
superfund_raw  <- superfund_clean
brownfield_raw <- brownfield_clean

# --- 2. Function: Convert to sf and remove empty geometries ---
to_sf_clean <- function(df, lon_col = "LONGITUDE", lat_col = "LATITUDE") {
  df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[lon_col]]) & !is.na(.data[[lat_col]])) %>%
    st_as_sf(coords = c(lon_col, lat_col), crs = 4326) %>%
    st_transform("ESRI:102010") %>%
    filter(!st_is_empty(.))
}

# --- 3. Function: Check duplicates by coordinates ---
check_dups <- function(sf_obj, name) {
  dup_summary <- sf_obj %>%
    st_coordinates() %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    group_by(X, Y) %>%
    summarise(n_sites = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(n_sites > 1)
  
  cat("=== ", name, " ===\n", sep = "")
  cat("Unique coord pairs duplicated: ", nrow(dup_summary), "\n", sep = "")
  cat("Total sites on duplicate coords: ", sum(dup_summary$n_sites), "\n", sep = "")
  cat("Rows removable (if deduping): ", sum(dup_summary$n_sites - 1), "\n\n", sep = "")
}

# --- 4. Function: Deduplicate by coordinates ---
dedup_sf <- function(sf_obj) {
  # Safety: only POINT geometries
  stopifnot(all(st_geometry_type(sf_obj) %in% c("POINT")))

  # Deduplicate based on coordinates, rounded to specified digits
  sf_obj %>%
    group_by(
      lon = round(st_coordinates(.)[,1], 5),
      lat = round(st_coordinates(.)[,2], 5)
    ) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup()
}

# --- 5. Convert each dataset to sf ---
tri_sf        <- to_sf_clean(tri_raw)
superfund_sf  <- to_sf_clean(superfund_raw)
brownfield_sf <- to_sf_clean(brownfield_raw)

# Public schools
public_school_sf <- to_sf_clean(public_school_clean, lon_col = "Longitude", lat_col = "Latitude")

# Private schools
private_school_sf <- to_sf_clean(private_school_clean, lon_col = "LON", lat_col = "LAT")

# Combine
all_school_sf <- bind_rows(
  public_school_sf %>% mutate(school_type = "Public"),
  private_school_sf %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
)

# --- 6. Store raw counts ---
counts_raw <- tibble(
  Dataset = c("TRI", "Superfund", "Brownfield"),
  Raw     = c(nrow(tri_raw), nrow(superfund_raw), nrow(brownfield_raw))
)

# --- 7. Store before counts (after removing empty geometries) ---
counts_before <- tibble(
  Dataset = c("TRI", "Superfund", "Brownfield"),
  Before  = c(nrow(tri_sf), nrow(superfund_sf), nrow(brownfield_sf))
)

# --- 8. Check duplicates & deduplicate individually ---
check_dups(tri_sf, "TRI")
tri_sf <- dedup_sf(tri_sf)

check_dups(superfund_sf, "Superfund")
superfund_sf <- dedup_sf(superfund_sf)

check_dups(brownfield_sf, "Brownfield")
brownfield_sf <- dedup_sf(brownfield_sf)

# --- 9. Store after counts (post-deduplication) ---
counts_after <- tibble(
  Dataset = c("TRI", "Superfund", "Brownfield"),
  After   = c(nrow(tri_sf), nrow(superfund_sf), nrow(brownfield_sf))
)

# --- 10. Combine pollution datasets ---
all_pollution_sf_before <- bind_rows(
  tri_sf %>% mutate(site_type = "TRI"),
  superfund_sf %>% mutate(site_type = "Superfund"),
  brownfield_sf %>% mutate(site_type = "Brownfield")
)
combined_before_count <- nrow(all_pollution_sf_before)

# --- 11. Check duplicates in combined dataset ---
check_dups(all_pollution_sf_before, "Combined (before dedup)")

# --- 12. Deduplicate combined dataset ---
all_pollution_sf <- dedup_sf(all_pollution_sf_before)
combined_after_count <- nrow(all_pollution_sf)

# --- 13. Confirm final datasets are clean ---
check_dups(tri_sf, "Final TRI")
check_dups(superfund_sf, "Final Superfund")
check_dups(brownfield_sf, "Final Brownfield")
check_dups(all_pollution_sf, "Final Combined")

# --- 14. Summary table with raw, before, after, removed counts ---
summary_table <- tibble(
  Dataset  = c("TRI", "Superfund", "Brownfield", "Combined"),
  Raw      = c(counts_raw$Raw, NA),
  Before   = c(counts_before$Before, combined_before_count),
  After    = c(counts_after$After, combined_after_count),
  Removed  = c(counts_before$Before - counts_after$After,
               combined_before_count - combined_after_count)
)

summary_table

```

# Step 5: Define function to generate school-site pairs
```{r}
distances_mi <- c(0.125, 0.25, 0.50, 1)  
distance_names <- c("0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi")

generate_pairs <- function(schools_sf, sites_sf, site_type, distances_mi, distance_names) {
  school_id_col <- "SCHOOL_ID"
  
  distances_m <- distances_mi * 1609.34
  all_pairs <- list()
  
  for (j in seq_along(distances_m)) {
    buffer <- st_buffer(sites_sf, distances_m[j])
    intersections <- st_intersects(schools_sf, buffer)
    
    temp <- tibble(
      SCHOOL_ID = schools_sf[[school_id_col]],
      site_ids = intersections
    ) %>%
      filter(lengths(site_ids) > 0) %>%
      unnest(cols = site_ids) %>%
      mutate(
        SITE_ID = sites_sf$SITE_ID[site_ids],
        buffer_distance = distance_names[j],
        site_type = site_type
      ) %>%
      select(SCHOOL_ID, SITE_ID, buffer_distance, site_type)
    
    all_pairs[[j]] <- temp
  }
  
  bind_rows(all_pairs)
}

```

# Step 6: Generate school-site pairs
```{r}
# --- All Schools ---
all_school_tri_pairs <- generate_pairs(all_school_sf, tri_sf,
                                       "TRI", distances_mi, distance_names)

all_school_superfund_pairs <- generate_pairs(all_school_sf, superfund_sf,
                                             "Superfund", distances_mi, distance_names)

all_school_brownfield_pairs <- generate_pairs(all_school_sf, brownfield_sf,
                                              "Brownfield", distances_mi, distance_names)

all_school_all_pairs <- generate_pairs(all_school_sf, all_pollution_sf,
                                       "All Pollution Sites", distances_mi, distance_names)

# --- Public schools ---
public_school_tri_pairs <- generate_pairs(public_school_sf, tri_sf,
                                          "TRI", distances_mi, distance_names)

public_school_superfund_pairs <- generate_pairs(public_school_sf, superfund_sf, 
                                                "Superfund", distances_mi, distance_names)

public_school_brownfield_pairs <- generate_pairs(public_school_sf, brownfield_sf, 
                                                 "Brownfield", distances_mi, distance_names)

public_school_all_pairs <- generate_pairs(public_school_sf, all_pollution_sf,
                                          "All Pollution Sites", distances_mi, distance_names)

# --- Private schools ---
private_school_tri_pairs <- generate_pairs(private_school_sf, tri_sf, 
                                           "TRI", distances_mi, distance_names)

private_school_superfund_pairs <- generate_pairs(private_school_sf, superfund_sf,
                                                 "Superfund", distances_mi, distance_names)

private_school_brownfield_pairs <- generate_pairs(private_school_sf, brownfield_sf,
                                                  "Brownfield", distances_mi, distance_names)

private_school_all_pairs <- generate_pairs(private_school_sf, all_pollution_sf,
                                           "All Pollution Sites", distances_mi, distance_names)

```

# Step 7: Summarize results
```{r}
summarize_pairs <- function(pairs_df, schools_sf) {
  with_state <- pairs_df %>%
    left_join(
      st_drop_geometry(schools_sf) %>% select(SCHOOL_ID, STATE, school_type),
      by = "SCHOOL_ID"
    )

  national <- pairs_df %>%
    group_by(buffer_distance) %>%
    summarise(
      unique_schools = n_distinct(SCHOOL_ID),
      total_intersections = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  state <- with_state %>%
    group_by(STATE, buffer_distance) %>%
    summarise(
      unique_schools = n_distinct(SCHOOL_ID),
      total_intersections = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  return(list(national = national, state = state))
}

# --- All Schools ---
tri_all_summary        <- summarize_pairs(all_school_tri_pairs, all_school_sf)
superfund_all_summary  <- summarize_pairs(all_school_superfund_pairs, all_school_sf)
brownfield_all_summary <- summarize_pairs(all_school_brownfield_pairs, all_school_sf)
all_all_summary        <- summarize_pairs(all_school_all_pairs, all_school_sf)

# --- Public schools ---
tri_public_summary        <- summarize_pairs(public_school_tri_pairs, public_school_sf)
superfund_public_summary  <- summarize_pairs(public_school_superfund_pairs, public_school_sf)
brownfield_public_summary <- summarize_pairs(public_school_brownfield_pairs, public_school_sf)
all_public_summary        <- summarize_pairs(public_school_all_pairs, public_school_sf)

# --- Private schools ---
tri_private_summary        <- summarize_pairs(private_school_tri_pairs, private_school_sf)
superfund_private_summary  <- summarize_pairs(private_school_superfund_pairs, private_school_sf)
brownfield_private_summary <- summarize_pairs(private_school_brownfield_pairs, private_school_sf)
all_private_summary        <- summarize_pairs(private_school_all_pairs, private_school_sf)

```

# Step 8: Combine results
```{r}
# Count total schools
n_all     <- nrow(all_school_sf)  
n_public  <- nrow(public_school_sf)
n_private <- nrow(private_school_sf)

# --- All schools ---
combined_national_all <- bind_rows(
  tri_all_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "TRI"),
  superfund_all_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "Superfund"),
  brownfield_all_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "Brownfield"),
  all_all_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "All Pollution Sites")
) %>%
  select(source, buffer_distance, unique_schools, total_intersections) %>%
  mutate(prop_unique = round(unique_schools / n_all, 2))

print(combined_national_all)

# --- Public schools ---
combined_national_public <- bind_rows(
  tri_public_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "TRI"),
  superfund_public_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "Superfund"),
  brownfield_public_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "Brownfield"),
  all_public_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "All Pollution Sites")
) %>%
  select(source, buffer_distance, unique_schools, total_intersections) %>%
  mutate(prop_unique = round(unique_schools / n_public, 2))

print(combined_national_public)

# --- Private schools ---
combined_national_private <- bind_rows(
  tri_private_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "TRI"),
  superfund_private_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "Superfund"),
  brownfield_private_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "Brownfield"),
  all_private_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "All Pollution Sites")
) %>%
  select(source, buffer_distance, unique_schools, total_intersections) %>%
  mutate(prop_unique = round(unique_schools / n_private, 2))

print(combined_national_private)

```

# Step 9: Merge site-pairs with public and private school characteristics
```{r}
# -------------------------------
# Public Schools + Site Pairs
# -------------------------------

# Select school variables for merging
public_school_vars <- c("SCHOOL_ID", "urbanicity", 
                        "Total_Students_Public_2023_24", 
                        "FRL_Students_Public_2023_24", 
                        "Black_Students_Public_2023_24", 
                        "Hispanic_Students_Public_2023_24", 
                        "Native_Students_Public_2023_24",
                        "Hawaiian_Students_Public_2023_24",
                        "Asian_Students_Public_2023_24",
                        "White_Students_Public_2023_24", 
                        "prop_frl", "prop_black", "prop_hispanic", 
                        "prop_native", "prop_hawaiian", "prop_asian", "prop_white",
                        "SCH_ENR_IDEA_TOTAL", "SCH_ENR_EL_TOTAL", 
                        "FTE_Teachers_Public_2023_24", "SCH_FTETEACH_TOT", 
                        "SCH_FTECOUNSELORS", "SCH_FTESERVICES_NUR","SCH_FTESERVICES_PSY", "SCH_FTESERVICES_SOC", 
                        "SCH_FTESECURITY_LEO", "SCH_FTESECURITY_GUA")

# Merge TRI pairs with school characteristics
tri_full_public <- public_school_tri_pairs %>%
  left_join(public_school_clean %>% select(all_of(public_school_vars)), by = c("SCHOOL_ID" = "SCHOOL_ID")) %>%
  mutate(site_type = "TRI")

# Merge Superfund pairs
superfund_full_public <- public_school_superfund_pairs %>%
  left_join(public_school_clean %>% select(all_of(public_school_vars)), by = c("SCHOOL_ID" = "SCHOOL_ID")) %>%
  mutate(site_type = "Superfund")

# Merge Brownfield pairs
brownfield_full_public <- public_school_brownfield_pairs %>%
  left_join(public_school_clean %>% select(all_of(public_school_vars)), by = c("SCHOOL_ID" = "SCHOOL_ID")) %>%
  mutate(site_type = "Brownfield")

# Merge All Pollution Site pairs
all_full_public <- public_school_all_pairs %>%
  left_join(public_school_clean %>% select(all_of(public_school_vars)), by = c("SCHOOL_ID" = "SCHOOL_ID")) %>%
  mutate(site_type = "All Pollution Sites")

# Combine all site types including All Pollution Sites
all_sites_full_public <- bind_rows(
  tri_full_public,
  superfund_full_public,
  brownfield_full_public,
  all_full_public    
)

# -------------------------------
# Private Schools + Site Pairs
# -------------------------------

# Select school variables for merging
private_school_vars <- c(
  "SCHOOL_ID", 
  "urbanicity", 
  "Total_Students_Private_2019_20", 
  "Black_Students_Private_2019_20", 
  "Hispanic_Students_Private_2019_20", 
  "Native_Students_Private_2019_20",
  "Hawaiian_Students_Private_2019_20",
  "Asian_Students_Private_2019_20",
  "White_Students_Private_2019_20", 
  "prop_black", "prop_hispanic", "prop_native", 
  "prop_hawaiian", "prop_asian", "prop_white", 
  "FTE_Teachers_Private_2019_20"
)

# TRI
tri_full_private <- private_school_tri_pairs %>%
  left_join(private_school_clean %>% select(all_of(private_school_vars)), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  mutate(site_type = "TRI")

# Superfund
superfund_full_private <- private_school_superfund_pairs %>%
  left_join(private_school_clean %>% select(all_of(private_school_vars)), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  mutate(site_type = "Superfund")

# Brownfield
brownfield_full_private <- private_school_brownfield_pairs %>%
  left_join(private_school_clean %>% select(all_of(private_school_vars)), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  mutate(site_type = "Brownfield")

# All Pollution Sites
all_full_private <- private_school_all_pairs %>%
  left_join(private_school_clean %>% select(all_of(private_school_vars)), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  mutate(site_type = "All Pollution Sites")

# Combine all site types including All Pollution Sites
all_sites_full_private <- bind_rows(
  tri_full_private,
  superfund_full_private,
  brownfield_full_private,
  all_full_private
)
 
```

# Step 10: Summarize public and private school characteristics
```{r}
# -----------------------------
# Define column order
# -----------------------------
column_order <- c(
  "school_type", "site_type", "buffer_distance",
  "n_schools", "total_intersections",
  "total_enrollment",
  "total_FRL", "total_NonFRL",
  "total_Black", "total_Hispanic", "total_Native",
  "total_Hawaiian", "total_Asian", "total_White",
  "total_IDEA", "total_NonIDEA",
  "total_EL", "total_NonEL",
  "total_teachers", "total_noninstr_staff", "total_staff",
  "prob_FRL", "prob_NonFRL",
  "prob_Black", "prob_Hispanic", "prob_Native",
  "prob_Hawaiian", "prob_Asian", "prob_White",
  "prob_IDEA", "prob_NonIDEA",
  "prob_EL", "prob_NonEL"
)

exposure_order <- c(column_order, "Distance", "Comparison", "Prob_Ratio")

# =============================
# Deduplicate datasets
# =============================
all_sites_nodup_public <- all_sites_full_public %>%
  distinct(SCHOOL_ID, site_type, buffer_distance, .keep_all = TRUE)

intersection_counts <- all_sites_full_public %>%
  count(site_type, buffer_distance, name = "total_intersections")

all_sites_nodup_private <- all_sites_full_private %>%
  distinct(SCHOOL_ID, site_type, buffer_distance, .keep_all = TRUE)

intersection_counts_private <- all_sites_full_private %>%
  count(site_type, buffer_distance, name = "total_intersections")

# =============================
# Factor levels for ordering
# =============================
site_type_levels <- c("Baseline", "All Pollution Sites", "Brownfield", "Superfund", "TRI")
buffer_levels   <- c("All Schools", "0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi")

# =============================
# Public Schools
# =============================
baseline_public <- public_school_clean %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools            = n(),
    total_teachers       = round(sum(FTE_Teachers_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_noninstr_staff = round(sum(SCH_FTESERVICES_NUR + SCH_FTESERVICES_PSY +
                                     SCH_FTESERVICES_SOC + SCH_FTESECURITY_LEO +
                                     SCH_FTESECURITY_GUA, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_enrollment     = sum(Total_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_FRL            = sum(FRL_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Black          = sum(Black_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hispanic       = sum(Hispanic_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Native         = sum(Native_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hawaiian       = sum(Hawaiian_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Asian          = sum(Asian_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_White          = sum(White_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_IDEA           = sum(SCH_ENR_IDEA_TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_EL             = sum(SCH_ENR_EL_TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    site_type           = "Baseline",
    buffer_distance     = "All Schools",
    total_intersections = NA,
    total_staff         = total_teachers + total_noninstr_staff,
    school_type         = "Public"
  ) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order))

sites_public <- all_sites_nodup_public %>%
  group_by(site_type, buffer_distance) %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools            = n(),
    total_teachers       = round(sum(FTE_Teachers_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_noninstr_staff = round(sum(SCH_FTESERVICES_NUR + SCH_FTESERVICES_PSY +
                                     SCH_FTESERVICES_SOC + SCH_FTESECURITY_LEO +
                                     SCH_FTESECURITY_GUA, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_enrollment     = sum(Total_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_FRL            = sum(FRL_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Black          = sum(Black_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hispanic       = sum(Hispanic_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Native         = sum(Native_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hawaiian       = sum(Hawaiian_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Asian          = sum(Asian_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_White          = sum(White_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_IDEA           = sum(SCH_ENR_IDEA_TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_EL             = sum(SCH_ENR_EL_TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(intersection_counts, by = c("site_type", "buffer_distance")) %>%
  mutate(
    total_staff = total_teachers + total_noninstr_staff,
    school_type = "Public"
  ) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order))

combined_public <- bind_rows(baseline_public, sites_public) %>%
  mutate(
    # Complement groups
    total_NonFRL  = total_enrollment - total_FRL,
    total_NonIDEA = total_enrollment - total_IDEA,
    total_NonEL   = total_enrollment - total_EL,

    # Baseline-normalized probabilities
    prob_FRL      = round(total_FRL / total_FRL[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_NonFRL   = round(total_NonFRL / total_NonFRL[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),

    prob_Black    = round(total_Black / total_Black[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Hispanic = round(total_Hispanic / total_Hispanic[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Native   = round(total_Native / total_Native[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Hawaiian = round(total_Hawaiian / total_Hawaiian[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Asian    = round(total_Asian / total_Asian[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_White    = round(total_White / total_White[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),

    prob_IDEA     = round(total_IDEA / total_IDEA[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_NonIDEA  = round(total_NonIDEA / total_NonIDEA[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),

    prob_EL       = round(total_EL / total_EL[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_NonEL    = round(total_NonEL / total_NonEL[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),

    site_type       = factor(site_type, levels = site_type_levels),
    buffer_distance = factor(buffer_distance, levels = buffer_levels)
  ) %>%
  arrange(site_type, buffer_distance) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order))

# =============================
# Private Schools
# =============================
baseline_private <- private_school_clean %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools            = n(),
    total_teachers       = round(sum(FTE_Teachers_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_noninstr_staff = NA,
    total_enrollment     = sum(Total_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_FRL            = NA,
    total_NonFRL         = NA,
    total_Black          = sum(Black_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hispanic       = sum(Hispanic_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Native         = sum(Native_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hawaiian       = sum(Hawaiian_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Asian          = sum(Asian_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_White          = sum(White_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_IDEA           = NA,
    total_NonIDEA        = NA,
    total_EL             = NA,
    total_NonEL          = NA
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    site_type           = "Baseline",
    buffer_distance     = "All Schools",
    total_intersections = NA,
    total_staff         = total_teachers,
    school_type         = "Private"
  ) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order))

sites_private <- all_sites_nodup_private %>%
  group_by(site_type, buffer_distance) %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools            = n(),
    total_teachers       = round(sum(FTE_Teachers_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_noninstr_staff = NA,
    total_enrollment     = sum(Total_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_FRL            = NA,
    total_NonFRL         = NA,
    total_Black          = sum(Black_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hispanic       = sum(Hispanic_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Native         = sum(Native_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hawaiian       = sum(Hawaiian_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Asian          = sum(Asian_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_White          = sum(White_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_IDEA           = NA,
    total_NonIDEA        = NA,
    total_EL             = NA,
    total_NonEL          = NA,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(intersection_counts_private, by = c("site_type", "buffer_distance")) %>%
  mutate(
    total_staff = total_teachers,
    school_type = "Private"
  ) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order))

combined_private <- bind_rows(baseline_private, sites_private) %>%
  mutate(
    prob_FRL      = NA,
    prob_NonFRL   = NA,
    prob_Black    = round(total_Black / total_Black[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Hispanic = round(total_Hispanic / total_Hispanic[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Native   = round(total_Native / total_Native[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Hawaiian = round(total_Hawaiian / total_Hawaiian[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Asian    = round(total_Asian / total_Asian[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_White    = round(total_White / total_White[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_IDEA     = NA,
    prob_NonIDEA  = NA,
    prob_EL       = NA,
    prob_NonEL    = NA,
    site_type       = factor(site_type, levels = site_type_levels),
    buffer_distance = factor(buffer_distance, levels = buffer_levels)
  ) %>%
  arrange(site_type, buffer_distance) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order))

# =============================
# Combined Public + Private
# =============================
combined_all <- bind_rows(combined_public, combined_private) %>%
  group_by(site_type, buffer_distance) %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools            = sum(n_schools, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_intersections  = sum(total_intersections, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_teachers       = sum(total_teachers, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_noninstr_staff = sum(total_noninstr_staff, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_enrollment     = sum(total_enrollment, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_FRL            = NA,
    total_NonFRL         = NA,
    total_Black          = sum(total_Black, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hispanic       = sum(total_Hispanic, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Native         = sum(total_Native, na.rm = TRUE), 
    total_Hawaiian       = sum(total_Hawaiian, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Asian          = sum(total_Asian, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_White          = sum(total_White, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_IDEA           = NA,
    total_NonIDEA        = NA,
    total_EL             = NA,
    total_NonEL          = NA, 
    total_staff          = sum(total_staff, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    prob_FRL      = NA,
    prob_NonFRL   = NA,
    prob_Black    = round(total_Black / total_Black[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Hispanic = round(total_Hispanic / total_Hispanic[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Native   = round(total_Native / total_Native[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Hawaiian = round(total_Hawaiian / total_Hawaiian[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Asian    = round(total_Asian / total_Asian[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_White    = round(total_White / total_White[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_IDEA     = NA,
    prob_NonIDEA  = NA,
    prob_EL       = NA,
    prob_NonEL    = NA,
    school_type   = "All Schools (Public and Private)"
  ) %>%
  arrange(site_type, buffer_distance) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order))

# =============================
# Exposure Ratios
# =============================
exposure_ratios <- bind_rows(combined_public, combined_private, combined_all) %>%
  filter(site_type == "All Pollution Sites") %>%
  mutate(
    Distance = factor(buffer_distance, levels = c("0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi")),

    FRL_vs_NonFRL = ifelse(school_type == "Public",
                           round(prob_FRL / prob_NonFRL, 2),
                           NA),

    Black_vs_White    = round(prob_Black / prob_White, 2),
    Hispanic_vs_White = round(prob_Hispanic / prob_White, 2),
    Native_vs_White   = round(prob_Native / prob_White, 2),
    Hawaiian_vs_White = round(prob_Hawaiian / prob_White, 2),
    Asian_vs_White    = round(prob_Asian / prob_White, 2),

    IDEA_vs_NonIDEA   = ifelse(school_type == "Public",
                               round(prob_IDEA / prob_NonIDEA, 2),
                               NA),

    EL_vs_NonEL       = ifelse(school_type == "Public",
                               round(prob_EL / prob_NonEL, 2),
                               NA)
  ) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order), Distance,
         FRL_vs_NonFRL, Black_vs_White, Hispanic_vs_White, 
         Native_vs_White, Hawaiian_vs_White, Asian_vs_White,
         IDEA_vs_NonIDEA, EL_vs_NonEL) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(FRL_vs_NonFRL, Black_vs_White, Hispanic_vs_White,
             Native_vs_White, Hawaiian_vs_White, Asian_vs_White,
             IDEA_vs_NonIDEA, EL_vs_NonEL),
    names_to = "Comparison",
    values_to = "Prob_Ratio"
  ) %>%
  arrange(school_type, Distance, Comparison) %>%
  select(any_of(exposure_order))

```

# Step 11: Summarize urbanicity 
```{r}
# =============================
# --- 1️⃣ Public Schools ---
# =============================

# Baseline totals per urbanicity
baseline_locale_public <- public_school_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(urbanicity)) %>%
  group_by(urbanicity) %>%
  summarise(total_schools_baseline = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(buffer_distance = "All Schools",
         site_type = "Baseline",
         total_intersections = NA,
         school_type = "Public")

# Unique intersections by buffer × urbanicity
locale_summary_public <- all_sites_full_public %>%
  filter(!is.na(urbanicity)) %>%
  group_by(site_type, buffer_distance, urbanicity) %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools = n_distinct(SCHOOL_ID),
    total_intersections = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Fill missing combinations
all_combos_public <- expand_grid(
  site_type = unique(locale_summary_public$site_type),
  buffer_distance = c("0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi"),
  urbanicity = c("city", "suburban", "town", "rural")
)

locale_summary_full_public <- all_combos_public %>%
  left_join(locale_summary_public, by = c("site_type", "buffer_distance", "urbanicity")) %>%
  mutate(
    n_schools = replace_na(n_schools, 0),
    total_intersections = replace_na(total_intersections, 0)
  )

locale_combined_public <- bind_rows(
  baseline_locale_public %>% rename(n_schools = total_schools_baseline),
  locale_summary_full_public %>% mutate(school_type = "Public")
) %>%
  arrange(site_type, buffer_distance, urbanicity)

# Compute proportions
locale_processed_public <- locale_combined_public %>%
  filter(site_type != "Baseline") %>%
  left_join(
    baseline_locale_public %>% select(urbanicity, total_schools_baseline),
    by = "urbanicity"
  ) %>%
  mutate(prop_schools = n_schools / total_schools_baseline) %>%
  select(school_type, site_type, buffer_distance, urbanicity,
         n_schools, total_intersections, total_schools = total_schools_baseline, prop_schools)


# =============================
# --- 2️⃣ Private Schools ---
# =============================

baseline_locale_private <- private_school_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(urbanicity)) %>%
  group_by(urbanicity) %>%
  summarise(total_schools_baseline = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(buffer_distance = "All Schools",
         site_type = "Baseline",
         total_intersections = NA,
         school_type = "Private")

locale_summary_private <- all_sites_full_private %>%
  filter(!is.na(urbanicity)) %>%
  group_by(site_type, buffer_distance, urbanicity) %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools = n_distinct(SCHOOL_ID),
    total_intersections = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

all_combos_private <- expand_grid(
  site_type = unique(locale_summary_private$site_type),
  buffer_distance = c("0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi"),
  urbanicity = c("city", "suburban", "town", "rural")
)

locale_summary_full_private <- all_combos_private %>%
  left_join(locale_summary_private, by = c("site_type", "buffer_distance", "urbanicity")) %>%
  mutate(
    n_schools = replace_na(n_schools, 0),
    total_intersections = replace_na(total_intersections, 0)
  )

locale_combined_private <- bind_rows(
  baseline_locale_private %>% rename(n_schools = total_schools_baseline),
  locale_summary_full_private %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
) %>%
  arrange(site_type, buffer_distance, urbanicity)

locale_processed_private <- locale_combined_private %>%
  filter(site_type != "Baseline") %>%
  left_join(
    baseline_locale_private %>% select(urbanicity, total_schools_baseline),
    by = "urbanicity"
  ) %>%
  mutate(prop_schools = n_schools / total_schools_baseline) %>%
  select(school_type, site_type, buffer_distance, urbanicity,
         n_schools, total_intersections, total_schools = total_schools_baseline, prop_schools)


# =============================
# --- 3️⃣ Combined Public + Private ---
# =============================

# Combine public + private rows
locale_combined_all <- bind_rows(
  locale_combined_public %>% mutate(school_type = "Public"),
  locale_combined_private %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
)

# Bring in baseline totals for all urbanicities
baseline_totals_all <- bind_rows(
  baseline_locale_public %>% mutate(school_type = "Public"),
  baseline_locale_private %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
) %>%
  group_by(urbanicity) %>%
  summarise(total_schools_baseline = sum(total_schools_baseline), .groups = "drop")

# Summarise by site_type × buffer_distance × urbanicity
locale_combined_all_summary <- locale_combined_all %>%
  group_by(site_type, buffer_distance, urbanicity) %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools = sum(n_schools, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_intersections = sum(total_intersections, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(school_type = "All Schools")

# Add baseline totals to compute proportions
locale_processed_all <- locale_combined_all_summary %>%
  left_join(baseline_totals_all, by = "urbanicity") %>%
  mutate(prop_schools = n_schools / total_schools_baseline) %>%
  select(
    school_type, site_type, buffer_distance, urbanicity,
    n_schools, total_intersections, total_schools = total_schools_baseline, prop_schools
  )

```

# Repeat Steps for Higher-Risk Sites
```{r}
# -------------------------------
# High-Risk Pollution Sites: School-Level Summary (Consistent Logic)
# -------------------------------

# -------------------------------
# 1. Superfund
# -------------------------------
superfund_highrisk_sf <- superfund_sf %>%
  mutate(
    HighRisk_flag = NPL %in% c("Currently on the Final NPL", "Site is Part of NPL Site")
  ) %>%
  select(SITE_ID, geometry, HighRisk_flag)

school_level_superfund <- all_school_superfund_pairs %>%
  left_join(superfund_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
            by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  mutate(HighRisk_flag = ifelse(is.na(HighRisk_flag), FALSE, HighRisk_flag)) %>%
  group_by(buffer_distance, SCHOOL_ID) %>%
  summarise(any_highrisk = any(HighRisk_flag), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(buffer_distance, any_highrisk) %>%
  summarise(n_schools = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    prop_schools = round(n_schools / n_all, 2),
    interpretation = ifelse(any_highrisk,
                            "Schools with ≥1 high-risk Superfund site nearby",
                            "Schools with 0 high-risk Superfund sites nearby")
  )

# -------------------------------
# 2. Brownfield
# -------------------------------
# NOTE: "Insuffient Inforamtion\n" is spelled incorrectly in the data
brownfield_highrisk_sf <- brownfield_sf %>%
  mutate(
    # Trim whitespace/newlines
    Contaminant_Clean = str_trim(Contaminants.Found.at.Actionable.Level),
    
    # Assign status
    Contaminant_Status = case_when(
      is.na(Contaminant_Clean) ~ "Missing",                        # NA → Missing
      Contaminant_Clean == "" ~ "Empty",                           # Empty string → Empty
      Contaminant_Clean == "No Contaminants\n" ~ "Empty",          # Exactly "No Contaminants\n" → Empty
      Contaminant_Clean == "Insuffient Inforamtion\n" ~ "Missing", # Exactly "Insuffient Inforamtion\n" → Missing
      Contaminant_Clean == "No Contaminants\nInsuffient Inforamtion\n" ~ "Missing", # Both → Missing
      TRUE ~ "Has Contaminants"                                     # Everything else → Has Contaminants
    ),
    
    # Cleanup flag
    Cleanup_Required = toupper(Indicate.whether.Cleanup.is.Necessary) == "Y",
    
    # High risk flag
    HighRisk_flag = Cleanup_Required & Contaminant_Status == "Has Contaminants"
  ) %>%
  select(SITE_ID, geometry, Contaminant_Status, Cleanup_Required, HighRisk_flag)

school_level_brownfield <- all_school_brownfield_pairs %>%
  left_join(brownfield_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
            by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  mutate(HighRisk_flag = ifelse(is.na(HighRisk_flag), FALSE, HighRisk_flag)) %>%
  group_by(buffer_distance, SCHOOL_ID) %>%
  summarise(any_highrisk = any(HighRisk_flag), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(buffer_distance, any_highrisk) %>%
  summarise(n_schools = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    prop_schools = round(n_schools / n_all, 2),
    interpretation = ifelse(any_highrisk,
                            "Schools with ≥1 high-risk Brownfield nearby",
                            "Schools with 0 high-risk Brownfield sites nearby")
  )

# -------------------------------
# 3. TRI
# -------------------------------
tri_highrisk_flag <- tri %>%
  mutate(
    total_releases_lbs = case_when(
      `X50..UNIT.OF.MEASURE` == "Pounds" ~ `X107..TOTAL.RELEASES`,
      `X50..UNIT.OF.MEASURE` == "Grams"  ~ `X107..TOTAL.RELEASES` * 0.00220462,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    HighRisk_flag = total_releases_lbs >= 1000
  ) %>%
  group_by(SITE_ID = trimws(X2..TRIFD)) %>%
  summarise(HighRisk_flag = any(HighRisk_flag, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

tri_highrisk_sf <- tri_sf %>%
  left_join(tri_highrisk_flag, by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  select(SITE_ID, geometry, HighRisk_flag)

school_level_tri <- all_school_tri_pairs %>%
  left_join(tri_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
            by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  mutate(HighRisk_flag = ifelse(is.na(HighRisk_flag), FALSE, HighRisk_flag)) %>%
  group_by(buffer_distance, SCHOOL_ID) %>%
  summarise(any_highrisk = any(HighRisk_flag), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(buffer_distance, any_highrisk) %>%
  summarise(n_schools = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    prop_schools = round(n_schools / n_all, 2),
    interpretation = ifelse(any_highrisk,
                            "Schools with ≥1 high-risk TRI site nearby",
                            "Schools with 0 high-risk TRI sites nearby")
  )

# -------------------------------
# 4. All high-risk sites combined
# -------------------------------
all_pollution_highrisk_sf <- dedup_sf(bind_rows(
  superfund_highrisk_sf,
  brownfield_highrisk_sf,
  tri_highrisk_sf
))

school_level_all <- all_school_all_pairs %>%
  left_join(all_pollution_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
            by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  mutate(HighRisk_flag = ifelse(is.na(HighRisk_flag), FALSE, HighRisk_flag)) %>%
  group_by(buffer_distance, SCHOOL_ID) %>%
  summarise(any_highrisk = any(HighRisk_flag), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(buffer_distance, any_highrisk) %>%
  summarise(n_schools = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    prop_schools = round(n_schools / n_all, 2),
    interpretation = ifelse(any_highrisk,
                            "Schools with ≥1 high-risk site nearby (any category)",
                            "Schools with 0 high-risk sites nearby")
  )

# -------------------------------
# 5. Print summaries
# -------------------------------

print(school_level_superfund)
print(school_level_brownfield)
print(school_level_tri)
print(school_level_all)

```

```{r}
# -------------------------------
# 1. Superfund: add demographics
# -------------------------------
schools_near_hr_superfunds <- all_school_superfund_pairs %>%
  left_join(superfund_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
            by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  mutate(HighRisk_flag = ifelse(is.na(HighRisk_flag), FALSE, HighRisk_flag)) %>%
  filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>%
  distinct(SCHOOL_ID, SITE_ID, buffer_distance)

schools_near_hr_superfunds_public <- schools_near_hr_superfunds %>%
  inner_join(public_school_clean, by = "SCHOOL_ID")

schools_near_hr_superfunds_private <- schools_near_hr_superfunds %>%
  inner_join(private_school_clean, by = "SCHOOL_ID")

schools_near_hr_superfunds_all <- bind_rows(
  schools_near_hr_superfunds_public %>% mutate(school_type = "Public"),
  schools_near_hr_superfunds_private %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
)

# -------------------------------
# 2. Brownfield: add demographics
# -------------------------------
schools_near_hr_brownfields <- all_school_brownfield_pairs %>%
  left_join(brownfield_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
            by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  mutate(HighRisk_flag = ifelse(is.na(HighRisk_flag), FALSE, HighRisk_flag)) %>%
  filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>%
  distinct(SCHOOL_ID, SITE_ID, buffer_distance)

schools_near_hr_brownfields_public <- schools_near_hr_brownfields %>%
  inner_join(public_school_clean, by = "SCHOOL_ID")

schools_near_hr_brownfields_private <- schools_near_hr_brownfields %>%
  inner_join(private_school_clean, by = "SCHOOL_ID")

schools_near_hr_brownfields_all <- bind_rows(
  schools_near_hr_brownfields_public %>% mutate(school_type = "Public"),
  schools_near_hr_brownfields_private %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
)

# -------------------------------
# 3. TRI: add demographics
# -------------------------------
schools_near_hr_tri <- all_school_tri_pairs %>%
  left_join(tri_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
            by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  mutate(HighRisk_flag = ifelse(is.na(HighRisk_flag), FALSE, HighRisk_flag)) %>%
  filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>%
  distinct(SCHOOL_ID, SITE_ID, buffer_distance)

schools_near_hr_tri_public <- schools_near_hr_tri %>%
  inner_join(public_school_clean, by = "SCHOOL_ID")

schools_near_hr_tri_private <- schools_near_hr_tri %>%
  inner_join(private_school_clean, by = "SCHOOL_ID")

schools_near_hr_tri_all <- bind_rows(
  schools_near_hr_tri_public %>% mutate(school_type = "Public"),
  schools_near_hr_tri_private %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
)

# -------------------------------
# 4. All high-risk sites combined
# -------------------------------
schools_near_hr_all <- all_school_all_pairs %>%
  left_join(all_pollution_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
            by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  mutate(HighRisk_flag = ifelse(is.na(HighRisk_flag), FALSE, HighRisk_flag)) %>%
  filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>%
  distinct(SCHOOL_ID, SITE_ID, buffer_distance)

schools_near_hr_all_public <- schools_near_hr_all %>%
  inner_join(public_school_clean, by = "SCHOOL_ID")

schools_near_hr_all_private <- schools_near_hr_all %>%
  inner_join(private_school_clean, by = "SCHOOL_ID")

schools_near_hr_all_combined <- bind_rows(
  schools_near_hr_all_public %>% mutate(school_type = "Public"),
  schools_near_hr_all_private %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
)

```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# Define column order
# -----------------------------
column_order_hr <- c(
  "school_type", "site_type", "buffer_distance",
  "n_schools", "total_intersections",
  "total_enrollment",
  "total_FRL", "total_NonFRL",
  "total_Black", "total_Hispanic", "total_Native",
  "total_Hawaiian", "total_Asian", "total_White",
  "total_IDEA", "total_NonIDEA",
  "total_EL", "total_NonEL",
  "total_teachers", "total_noninstr_staff", "total_staff",
  "prob_FRL", "prob_NonFRL",
  "prob_Black", "prob_Hispanic", "prob_Native",
  "prob_Hawaiian", "prob_Asian", "prob_White",
  "prob_IDEA", "prob_NonIDEA",
  "prob_EL", "prob_NonEL"
)

exposure_order_hr <- c(column_order_hr, "Distance", "Comparison", "Prob_Ratio")

# -----------------------------
# Combine all high-risk sites
# -----------------------------
all_sites_hr_public_combined <- bind_rows(
  schools_near_hr_superfunds_all %>% filter(school_type=="Public") %>% mutate(site_type = "Superfund"),
  schools_near_hr_brownfields_all %>% filter(school_type=="Public") %>% mutate(site_type = "Brownfield"),
  schools_near_hr_tri_all %>% filter(school_type=="Public") %>% mutate(site_type = "TRI"),
  schools_near_hr_all_combined %>% filter(school_type=="Public") %>% mutate(site_type = "All Pollution Sites")
)

all_sites_hr_private_combined <- bind_rows(
  schools_near_hr_superfunds_all %>% filter(school_type=="Private") %>% mutate(site_type = "Superfund"),
  schools_near_hr_brownfields_all %>% filter(school_type=="Private") %>% mutate(site_type = "Brownfield"),
  schools_near_hr_tri_all %>% filter(school_type=="Private") %>% mutate(site_type = "TRI"),
  schools_near_hr_all_combined %>% filter(school_type=="Private") %>% mutate(site_type = "All Pollution Sites")
)

# -----------------------------
# Deduplicate datasets
# -----------------------------
hr_sites_nodup_public <- all_sites_hr_public_combined %>%
  distinct(SCHOOL_ID, site_type, buffer_distance, .keep_all = TRUE)

hr_intersection_counts_public <- all_sites_hr_public_combined %>%
  count(site_type, buffer_distance, name = "total_intersections")

hr_sites_nodup_private <- all_sites_hr_private_combined %>%
  distinct(SCHOOL_ID, site_type, buffer_distance, .keep_all = TRUE)

hr_intersection_counts_private <- all_sites_hr_private_combined %>%
  count(site_type, buffer_distance, name = "total_intersections")

# -----------------------------
# Factor levels
# -----------------------------
site_type_levels_hr <- c("Baseline", "All Pollution Sites", "Brownfield", "Superfund", "TRI")
buffer_levels_hr   <- c("All Schools", "0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi")

# -----------------------------
# Public Schools
# -----------------------------
baseline_public_hr <- public_school_clean %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools            = n(),
    total_teachers       = round(sum(FTE_Teachers_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_noninstr_staff = round(sum(SCH_FTESERVICES_NUR + SCH_FTESERVICES_PSY +
                                     SCH_FTESERVICES_SOC + SCH_FTESECURITY_LEO +
                                     SCH_FTESECURITY_GUA, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_enrollment     = sum(Total_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_FRL            = sum(FRL_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Black          = sum(Black_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hispanic       = sum(Hispanic_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Native         = sum(Native_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hawaiian       = sum(Hawaiian_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Asian          = sum(Asian_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_White          = sum(White_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_IDEA           = sum(SCH_ENR_IDEA_TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_EL             = sum(SCH_ENR_EL_TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    site_type           = "Baseline",
    buffer_distance     = "All Schools",
    total_intersections = NA,
    total_staff         = total_teachers + total_noninstr_staff,
    school_type         = "Public"
  ) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order_hr))

sites_public_hr <- hr_sites_nodup_public %>%
  group_by(site_type, buffer_distance) %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools            = n(),
    total_teachers       = round(sum(FTE_Teachers_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_noninstr_staff = round(sum(SCH_FTESERVICES_NUR + SCH_FTESERVICES_PSY +
                                     SCH_FTESERVICES_SOC + SCH_FTESECURITY_LEO +
                                     SCH_FTESECURITY_GUA, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_enrollment     = sum(Total_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_FRL            = sum(FRL_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Black          = sum(Black_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hispanic       = sum(Hispanic_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Native         = sum(Native_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hawaiian       = sum(Hawaiian_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Asian          = sum(Asian_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_White          = sum(White_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_IDEA           = sum(SCH_ENR_IDEA_TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_EL             = sum(SCH_ENR_EL_TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(hr_intersection_counts_public, by = c("site_type", "buffer_distance")) %>%
  mutate(
    total_staff = total_teachers + total_noninstr_staff,
    school_type = "Public"
  ) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order_hr))

combined_public_hr <- bind_rows(baseline_public_hr, sites_public_hr) %>%
  mutate(
    # Complement groups
    total_NonFRL  = total_enrollment - total_FRL,
    total_NonIDEA = total_enrollment - total_IDEA,
    total_NonEL   = total_enrollment - total_EL,

    # Baseline-normalized probabilities
    prob_FRL      = round(total_FRL / total_FRL[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_NonFRL   = round(total_NonFRL / total_NonFRL[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Black    = round(total_Black / total_Black[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Hispanic = round(total_Hispanic / total_Hispanic[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Native   = round(total_Native / total_Native[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Hawaiian = round(total_Hawaiian / total_Hawaiian[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Asian    = round(total_Asian / total_Asian[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_White    = round(total_White / total_White[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_IDEA     = round(total_IDEA / total_IDEA[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_NonIDEA  = round(total_NonIDEA / total_NonIDEA[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_EL       = round(total_EL   / total_EL[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_NonEL    = round(total_NonEL / total_NonEL[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),

    site_type       = factor(site_type, levels = site_type_levels_hr),
    buffer_distance = factor(buffer_distance, levels = buffer_levels_hr)
  ) %>%
  arrange(site_type, buffer_distance) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order_hr))

# -----------------------------
# Private Schools
# -----------------------------
baseline_private_hr <- private_school_clean %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools            = n(),
    total_teachers       = round(sum(FTE_Teachers_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_noninstr_staff = NA,
    total_enrollment     = sum(Total_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_FRL            = NA,
    total_NonFRL         = NA,
    total_Black          = sum(Black_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hispanic       = sum(Hispanic_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Native         = sum(Native_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hawaiian       = sum(Hawaiian_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Asian          = sum(Asian_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_White          = sum(White_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_IDEA           = NA,
    total_NonIDEA        = NA,
    total_EL             = NA,
    total_NonEL          = NA
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    site_type           = "Baseline",
    buffer_distance     = "All Schools",
    total_intersections = NA,
    total_staff         = total_teachers,
    school_type         = "Private"
  ) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order_hr))

sites_private_hr <- hr_sites_nodup_private %>%
  group_by(site_type, buffer_distance) %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools            = n(),
    total_teachers       = round(sum(FTE_Teachers_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE)),
    total_noninstr_staff = NA,
    total_enrollment     = sum(Total_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_FRL            = NA,
    total_NonFRL         = NA,
    total_Black          = sum(Black_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hispanic       = sum(Hispanic_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Native         = sum(Native_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hawaiian       = sum(Hawaiian_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Asian          = sum(Asian_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_White          = sum(White_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_IDEA           = NA,
    total_NonIDEA        = NA,
    total_EL             = NA,
    total_NonEL          = NA,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(hr_intersection_counts_private, by = c("site_type", "buffer_distance")) %>%
  mutate(
    total_staff = total_teachers,
    school_type = "Private"
  ) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order_hr))

combined_private_hr <- bind_rows(baseline_private_hr, sites_private_hr) %>%
  mutate(
    prob_FRL      = NA,
    prob_NonFRL   = NA,
    prob_Black    = round(total_Black / total_Black[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Hispanic = round(total_Hispanic / total_Hispanic[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Native   = round(total_Native / total_Native[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Hawaiian = round(total_Hawaiian / total_Hawaiian[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Asian    = round(total_Asian / total_Asian[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_White    = round(total_White / total_White[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_IDEA     = NA,
    prob_NonIDEA  = NA,
    prob_EL       = NA,
    prob_NonEL    = NA,
    site_type       = factor(site_type, levels = site_type_levels_hr),
    buffer_distance = factor(buffer_distance, levels = buffer_levels_hr)
  ) %>%
  arrange(site_type, buffer_distance) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order_hr))

# -----------------------------
# Combined Public + Private
# -----------------------------
combined_all_hr <- bind_rows(combined_public_hr, combined_private_hr) %>%
  group_by(site_type, buffer_distance) %>%
  summarise(
    n_schools            = sum(n_schools, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_intersections  = sum(total_intersections, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_teachers       = sum(total_teachers, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_noninstr_staff = sum(total_noninstr_staff, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_enrollment     = sum(total_enrollment, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_FRL            = NA,
    total_NonFRL         = NA,
    total_Black          = sum(total_Black, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Hispanic       = sum(total_Hispanic, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Native         = sum(total_Native, na.rm = TRUE), 
    total_Hawaiian       = sum(total_Hawaiian, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Asian          = sum(total_Asian, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_White          = sum(total_White, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_IDEA           = NA,
    total_NonIDEA        = NA,
    total_EL             = NA,
    total_NonEL          = NA, 
    total_staff          = sum(total_staff, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    prob_FRL      = NA,
    prob_NonFRL   = NA,
    prob_Black    = round(total_Black / total_Black[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Hispanic = round(total_Hispanic / total_Hispanic[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Native   = round(total_Native / total_Native[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Hawaiian = round(total_Hawaiian / total_Hawaiian[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_Asian    = round(total_Asian / total_Asian[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_White    = round(total_White / total_White[site_type=="Baseline" & buffer_distance=="All Schools"], 3),
    prob_IDEA     = NA,
    prob_NonIDEA  = NA,
    prob_EL       = NA,
    prob_NonEL    = NA,
    school_type   = "All Schools (Public and Private)"
  ) %>%
  arrange(site_type, buffer_distance) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order_hr))

# -----------------------------
# Exposure Ratios
# -----------------------------
exposure_ratios_hr <- bind_rows(combined_public_hr, combined_private_hr, combined_all_hr) %>%
  filter(site_type == "All Pollution Sites") %>%
  mutate(
    Distance = factor(buffer_distance, levels = c("0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi")),

    FRL_vs_NonFRL = ifelse(school_type == "Public",
                           round(prob_FRL / prob_NonFRL, 2),
                           NA),

    Black_vs_White    = round(prob_Black / prob_White, 2),
    Hispanic_vs_White = round(prob_Hispanic / prob_White, 2),
    Native_vs_White   = round(prob_Native / prob_White, 2),
    Hawaiian_vs_White = round(prob_Hawaiian / prob_White, 2),
    Asian_vs_White    = round(prob_Asian / prob_White, 2),

    IDEA_vs_NonIDEA   = ifelse(school_type == "Public",
                               round(prob_IDEA / prob_NonIDEA, 2),
                               NA),

    EL_vs_NonEL       = ifelse(school_type == "Public",
                               round(prob_EL / prob_NonEL, 2),
                               NA)
  ) %>%
  select(any_of(column_order_hr), Distance,
         FRL_vs_NonFRL, Black_vs_White, Hispanic_vs_White, 
         Native_vs_White, Hawaiian_vs_White, Asian_vs_White,
         IDEA_vs_NonIDEA, EL_vs_NonEL) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(FRL_vs_NonFRL, Black_vs_White, Hispanic_vs_White,
             Native_vs_White, Hawaiian_vs_White, Asian_vs_White,
             IDEA_vs_NonIDEA, EL_vs_NonEL),
    names_to = "Comparison",
    values_to = "Prob_Ratio"
  ) %>%
  arrange(school_type, Distance, Comparison) %>%
  select(any_of(exposure_order_hr))

# -----------------------------
# Print outputs
# -----------------------------

combined_public_hr
combined_private_hr
combined_all_hr
exposure_ratios_hr

```

# PNAS Specific Revisions
```{r}
# ============================================================
# SITE URBANICITY SUMMARY — ALL SITE TYPES & ALL DISTANCES
# ============================================================

# --- 1. Load shapefile + recode NCES locale codes ---
locale_sf <- st_read("Data/Schools/EDGE_Locale25_US/EDGE_LOCALE25_US.shp") %>%
  mutate(
    site_urbanicity = case_when(
      LOCALE %in% c(11,12,13) ~ "city",
      LOCALE %in% c(21,22,23) ~ "suburban",
      LOCALE %in% c(31,32,33) ~ "town",
      LOCALE %in% c(41,42,43) ~ "rural",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# --- 2. Align coordinate system with pollution sites ---
locale_sf <- st_transform(locale_sf, st_crs(all_pollution_sf))

# --- 3. Spatial join: assign urbanicity to each site type separately
# This ensures all sites from each specific sf get urbanicity assigned,
# including the 15 brownfield sites dropped during all_pollution_sf deduplication
sites_with_locale_superfund <- st_join(superfund_sf, locale_sf) %>%
  select(SITE_ID, site_urbanicity)

sites_with_locale_brownfield <- st_join(brownfield_sf, locale_sf) %>%
  select(SITE_ID, site_urbanicity)

sites_with_locale_tri <- st_join(tri_sf, locale_sf) %>%
  select(SITE_ID, site_urbanicity)

# All pollution sites uses all_pollution_sf which is deduplicated
# across all three site types
sites_with_locale_all <- st_join(all_pollution_sf, locale_sf) %>%
  select(SITE_ID, site_urbanicity)

# --- 4. Check distribution across urbanicity categories ---
table(sites_with_locale_superfund$site_urbanicity,  useNA = "ifany")
table(sites_with_locale_brownfield$site_urbanicity, useNA = "ifany")
table(sites_with_locale_tri$site_urbanicity,        useNA = "ifany")
table(sites_with_locale_all$site_urbanicity,        useNA = "ifany")

# --- Count sites with missing urbanicity by site type ---
bind_rows(
  sites_with_locale_superfund  %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% mutate(site_type = "Superfund"),
  sites_with_locale_brownfield %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% mutate(site_type = "Brownfield"),
  sites_with_locale_tri        %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% mutate(site_type = "TRI"),
  sites_with_locale_all        %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% mutate(site_type = "All Pollution Sites")
) %>%
  group_by(site_type) %>%
  summarise(
    total       = n(),
    missing     = sum(is.na(site_urbanicity)),
    pct_missing = round(mean(is.na(site_urbanicity)) * 100, 1),
    .groups     = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print()

# ============================================================
# BUILD DENOMINATORS
# Each denom pulls from the specific site type sf so counts
# match exactly the universe each pair dataframe was built from
# ============================================================

denom_superfund <- sites_with_locale_superfund %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  count(site_urbanicity, name = "total_sites")

denom_brownfield <- sites_with_locale_brownfield %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  count(site_urbanicity, name = "total_sites")

denom_tri <- sites_with_locale_tri %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  count(site_urbanicity, name = "total_sites")

denom_all <- sites_with_locale_all %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  count(site_urbanicity, name = "total_sites")

# ============================================================
# ATTACH URBANICITY TO EACH PAIR DATASET
# Each pair dataset gets urbanicity joined from its corresponding
# sites_with_locale_* object
# ============================================================

superfund_with_urb <- all_school_superfund_pairs %>%
  left_join(sites_with_locale_superfund %>% st_drop_geometry(), by = "SITE_ID")

brownfield_with_urb <- all_school_brownfield_pairs %>%
  left_join(sites_with_locale_brownfield %>% st_drop_geometry(), by = "SITE_ID")

tri_with_urb <- all_school_tri_pairs %>%
  left_join(sites_with_locale_tri %>% st_drop_geometry(), by = "SITE_ID")

all_with_urb <- all_school_all_pairs %>%
  left_join(sites_with_locale_all %>% st_drop_geometry(), by = "SITE_ID")

# ============================================================
# COMPUTE SUMMARY FOR EACH SITE TYPE AND DISTANCE
# For each combination:
#   1. Filter to the buffer distance
#   2. Deduplicate so each site is counted once per urbanicity
#   3. Count sites near schools by urbanicity
#   4. Join the denominator and compute the percentage
# ============================================================

distances <- c("0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi")
results   <- list()

for (dist in distances) {

  # --- Superfund ---
  results[[paste0("superfund_", dist)]] <- superfund_with_urb %>%
    filter(buffer_distance == dist) %>%
    distinct(SITE_ID, site_urbanicity) %>%
    count(site_urbanicity, name = "sites_near_schools") %>%
    left_join(denom_superfund, by = "site_urbanicity") %>%
    mutate(dataset = "Superfund", buffer_distance = dist,
           pct_near = round((sites_near_schools / total_sites) * 100, 1))

  # --- Brownfield ---
  results[[paste0("brownfield_", dist)]] <- brownfield_with_urb %>%
    filter(buffer_distance == dist) %>%
    distinct(SITE_ID, site_urbanicity) %>%
    count(site_urbanicity, name = "sites_near_schools") %>%
    left_join(denom_brownfield, by = "site_urbanicity") %>%
    mutate(dataset = "Brownfield", buffer_distance = dist,
           pct_near = round((sites_near_schools / total_sites) * 100, 1))

  # --- TRI ---
  results[[paste0("tri_", dist)]] <- tri_with_urb %>%
    filter(buffer_distance == dist) %>%
    distinct(SITE_ID, site_urbanicity) %>%
    count(site_urbanicity, name = "sites_near_schools") %>%
    left_join(denom_tri, by = "site_urbanicity") %>%
    mutate(dataset = "TRI", buffer_distance = dist,
           pct_near = round((sites_near_schools / total_sites) * 100, 1))

  # --- All Pollution Sites ---
  results[[paste0("all_", dist)]] <- all_with_urb %>%
    filter(buffer_distance == dist) %>%
    distinct(SITE_ID, site_urbanicity) %>%
    count(site_urbanicity, name = "sites_near_schools") %>%
    left_join(denom_all, by = "site_urbanicity") %>%
    mutate(dataset = "All Pollution Sites", buffer_distance = dist,
           pct_near = round((sites_near_schools / total_sites) * 100, 1))
}

# ============================================================
# COMBINE ALL RESULTS INTO ONE SUMMARY TABLE
# ============================================================

site_urbanicity_summary_all <- bind_rows(results) %>%
  select(dataset, buffer_distance, site_urbanicity, sites_near_schools, total_sites, pct_near) %>%
  arrange(dataset, buffer_distance, site_urbanicity)

site_urbanicity_summary_wide <- site_urbanicity_summary_all %>%
  mutate(prop_near = pct_near / 100) %>%
  select(dataset, buffer_distance, site_urbanicity, prop_near) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = site_urbanicity,
    values_from = prop_near
  ) %>%
  select(dataset, buffer_distance, city, suburban, town, rural, `NA`) %>%
  arrange(dataset, buffer_distance)

print(site_urbanicity_summary_all)
print(site_urbanicity_summary_wide)
write.csv(site_urbanicity_summary_wide, "Data/Newly Built/site_urbanicity_summary_wide.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
# --- Replication of Currie (2011) proximity metric ---
# Currie et al. (2011) estimates residential proximity to TRI and Superfund sites
# in FL, MI, NJ, PA, and TX. Here we calculate the analogous school-based estimates
# for direct comparison of school vs. residential exposure

# --- 1. Generate pairs at exactly 2000m for TRI and Superfund, all schools ---
distances_mi_2000m <- 2000 / 1609.34  # convert 2000m to miles for generate_pairs input
distance_name_2000m <- "2000m"

all_school_tri_pairs_2000m <- generate_pairs(all_school_sf, tri_sf,
                                              "TRI", distances_mi_2000m, distance_name_2000m)

all_school_superfund_pairs_2000m <- generate_pairs(all_school_sf, superfund_sf,
                                                    "Superfund", distances_mi_2000m, distance_name_2000m)

# --- 2. Define target states ---
target_states <- c("FL", "MI", "NJ", "PA", "TX")

# --- 3. School-level dataset with enrollment ---
# coalesce handles the fact that public and private use different enrollment columns
all_school_clean_enroll <- bind_rows(
  public_school_clean %>% mutate(school_type = "Public"),
  private_school_clean %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
) %>%
  mutate(total_students = coalesce(Total_Students_Public_2023_24,
                                   Total_Students_Private_2019_20))

# --- 4. Total schools and students in target states (denominators) ---
total_by_state <- all_school_clean_enroll %>%
  filter(STATE %in% target_states) %>%
  group_by(STATE) %>%
  summarise(
    total_schools  = n_distinct(SCHOOL_ID),
    total_students = sum(total_students, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- 5. Helper to get near-site counts by state ---
near_site_by_state <- function(pairs_2000m, site_label) {
  pairs_2000m %>%
    left_join(
      all_school_clean_enroll %>% select(SCHOOL_ID, STATE, total_students),
      by = "SCHOOL_ID"
    ) %>%
    filter(STATE %in% target_states) %>%
    distinct(SCHOOL_ID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    group_by(STATE) %>%
    summarise(
      !!paste0("schools_near_", site_label) := n_distinct(SCHOOL_ID),
      !!paste0("students_near_", site_label) := sum(total_students, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

near_tri_by_state       <- near_site_by_state(all_school_tri_pairs_2000m,       "tri")
near_superfund_by_state <- near_site_by_state(all_school_superfund_pairs_2000m, "superfund")

# --- 6. State-level summary table ---
state_summary_currie <- total_by_state %>%
  left_join(near_tri_by_state,       by = "STATE") %>%
  left_join(near_superfund_by_state, by = "STATE") %>%
  mutate(
    pct_schools_near_tri        = round(schools_near_tri        / total_schools  * 100, 1),
    pct_students_near_tri       = round(students_near_tri       / total_students * 100, 1),
    pct_schools_near_superfund  = round(schools_near_superfund  / total_schools  * 100, 1),
    pct_students_near_superfund = round(students_near_superfund / total_students * 100, 1)
  )

# --- 7. Combined 5-state totals row ---
totals_row <- state_summary_currie %>%
  summarise(
    STATE                       = "TOTAL (5 states)",
    total_schools               = sum(total_schools),
    total_students              = sum(total_students),
    schools_near_tri            = sum(schools_near_tri),
    students_near_tri           = sum(students_near_tri),
    schools_near_superfund      = sum(schools_near_superfund),
    students_near_superfund     = sum(students_near_superfund),
    pct_schools_near_tri        = round(schools_near_tri        / total_schools  * 100, 1),
    pct_students_near_tri       = round(students_near_tri       / total_students * 100, 1),
    pct_schools_near_superfund  = round(schools_near_superfund  / total_schools  * 100, 1),
    pct_students_near_superfund = round(students_near_superfund / total_students * 100, 1)
  )

# --- 8. Print final table ---
currie_comparison_table <- bind_rows(state_summary_currie, totals_row)

currie_comparison_table %>% select(STATE, total_schools, total_students, schools_near_superfund, students_near_superfund, pct_schools_near_superfund, pct_students_near_superfund) %>% print(row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
# --- Validation: State-level blood lead levels vs school proximity to pollution sites ---
# Correlates % of children with confirmed blood lead levels (≥3.5 and ≥5 µg/dL) by state
# with the proportion of schools within 0.25 miles of any pollution site
# Higher school proximity to pollution sites should predict higher blood lead rates

# --- 1. Build all_school_clean (also used in Figure 2 and Grace's state summary table) ---
all_school_clean <- bind_rows(
  public_school_clean %>% mutate(school_type = "Public"),
  private_school_clean %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
)

# --- 2. Build quarter_mile_summary and state_crosswalk (also used in Figures 3 and 4) ---
total_schools_state <- all_school_clean %>%
  group_by(STATE) %>%
  summarise(total_schools = n_distinct(SCHOOL_ID), .groups = "drop")

quarter_mile_summary <- all_all_summary$state %>%
  filter(buffer_distance == "0.25mi") %>%
  left_join(total_schools_state, by = "STATE") %>%
  mutate(prop_near_site = unique_schools / total_schools) %>%
  rename(state = STATE)

state_crosswalk <- tibble(
  state_abbrev = state.abb,
  state_name   = state.name
) %>%
  bind_rows(
    tibble(state_abbrev = "DC", state_name = "District of Columbia"),
    tibble(state_abbrev = "PR", state_name = "Puerto Rico")
  )

# --- 3. Load and clean blood lead data ---
clean_lead <- function(path) {
  suppressWarnings(
    read.csv(path) %>%
      mutate(
        Value  = as.numeric(gsub("%", "", Value)),
        Number = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Number))
      )
  )
}

child_lead_3.5_data <- clean_lead("Data/Misc/child_lead_3.5_micrograms/data_165415.csv")
child_lead_5_data   <- clean_lead("Data/Misc/child_lead_5_micrograms/data_165805.csv")

# --- 4. Join blood lead data with school proximity by state ---
join_lead <- function(lead_df) {
  lead_df %>%
    left_join(state_crosswalk, by = c("State" = "state_name")) %>%
    rename(state = state_abbrev) %>%
    left_join(quarter_mile_summary %>% select(state, prop_near_site), by = "state") %>%
    filter(!is.na(Value), !is.na(prop_near_site))
}

child_lead_3.5_joined <- join_lead(child_lead_3.5_data)
child_lead_5_joined   <- join_lead(child_lead_5_data)

# --- 5. Correlations ---
cor_3.5 <- cor.test(child_lead_3.5_joined$prop_near_site, child_lead_3.5_joined$Value, method = "pearson")
cor_5   <- cor.test(child_lead_5_joined$prop_near_site,   child_lead_5_joined$Value,   method = "pearson")

cat("Correlation (3.5 µg/dL threshold):", round(cor_3.5$estimate, 3), "p-value:", round(cor_3.5$p.value, 4), "\n")
cat("Correlation (5 µg/dL threshold):",   round(cor_5$estimate, 3),   "p-value:", round(cor_5$p.value, 4), "\n")

# --- 6. Check missing states ---
states_proximity <- quarter_mile_summary %>% pull(state)
states_lead_3.5  <- child_lead_3.5_data %>% left_join(state_crosswalk, by = c("State" = "state_name")) %>% pull(state_abbrev)
states_lead_5    <- child_lead_5_data   %>% left_join(state_crosswalk, by = c("State" = "state_name")) %>% pull(state_abbrev)

cat("In proximity but missing from 3.5 data:", paste(setdiff(states_proximity, states_lead_3.5), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("In proximity but missing from 5.0 data:", paste(setdiff(states_proximity, states_lead_5),   collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("In 3.5 data but missing from proximity:", paste(setdiff(states_lead_3.5, states_proximity), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("In 5.0 data but missing from proximity:", paste(setdiff(states_lead_5,   states_proximity), collapse = ", "), "\n")

cat("States in final 3.5 correlation:", nrow(child_lead_3.5_joined), "\n")
cat("States in final 5.0 correlation:", nrow(child_lead_5_joined),   "\n")

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# School-Level Pollution Proximity Dataset (requested by Matt, 5/4/26)
# Combines public and private schools into one school-level file with:
# - 1/0 proximity indicators for each site type and buffer distance
# - Student demographic proportions
# - Urbanicity, state, county, and ZIP code
# ============================================================

# --- 1. Load geographic data ---
# Public school geo file uses NCESSCH as the school ID
geo_public <- read.csv("Data/Schools/Public/EDGE_GEOCODE_PUBLICSCH_2324/EDGE_GEOCODE_PUBLICSCH_2324/EDGE_GEOCODE_PUBLICSCH_2324.csv",
                       colClasses = c("NCESSCH" = "character")) %>%
  select(NCESSCH, ZIP, CNTY, NMCNTY) %>%
  rename(SCHOOL_ID = NCESSCH)

# Private school geo file uses PPIN as the school ID
geo_private <- read.csv("Data/Schools/Private/EDGE_GEOCODE_PRIVATESCH_2324/EDGE_GEOCODE_PRIVATESCH_2324.csv",
                        colClasses = c("PPIN" = "character")) %>%
  select(PPIN, ZIP, CNTY, NMCNTY) %>%
  rename(SCHOOL_ID = PPIN)

# --- 2. Build base school-level dataset ---
# Public and private are bound together with a school_type indicator
# Private schools have NA for FRL, IDEA, and EL since that data is not collected
school_base <- bind_rows(
  public_school_clean %>%
    mutate(school_type = "Public") %>%
    left_join(geo_public, by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
    select(
      SCHOOL_ID, school_type, STATE, urbanicity,
      ZIP, CNTY, NMCNTY,
      total_students = Total_Students_Public_2023_24,
      prop_frl, prop_black, prop_hispanic, prop_native,
      prop_hawaiian, prop_asian, prop_white,
      SCH_ENR_IDEA_TOTAL, SCH_ENR_EL_TOTAL
    ),
  
  private_school_clean %>%
    mutate(school_type = "Private") %>%
    left_join(geo_private, by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
    select(
      SCHOOL_ID, school_type, STATE, urbanicity,
      ZIP, CNTY, NMCNTY,
      total_students = Total_Students_Private_2019_20,
      prop_black, prop_hispanic, prop_native,
      prop_hawaiian, prop_asian, prop_white
    )
)

# --- 3. Build 1/0 proximity indicators for each site type and distance ---
# For each combination: 1 = school has at least one site within that distance, 0 = none
# Each left_join brings in schools that have a nearby site, NAs filled with 0 at the end

proximity_indicators <- school_base %>%
  select(SCHOOL_ID) %>%

  # --- Superfund ---
  left_join(all_school_superfund_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "0.125mi") %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(Superfund_0125mi = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
```
