```{r}
  left_join(all_school_superfund_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "0.25mi")  %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(Superfund_025mi  = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  left_join(all_school_superfund_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "0.5mi")   %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(Superfund_05mi   = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  left_join(all_school_superfund_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "1mi")     %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(Superfund_1mi    = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%

  # --- Brownfield ---
  left_join(all_school_brownfield_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "0.125mi") %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(Brownfield_0125mi = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  left_join(all_school_brownfield_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "0.25mi")  %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(Brownfield_025mi  = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  left_join(all_school_brownfield_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "0.5mi")   %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(Brownfield_05mi   = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  left_join(all_school_brownfield_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "1mi")     %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(Brownfield_1mi    = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%

  # --- TRI ---
  left_join(all_school_tri_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "0.125mi") %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(TRI_0125mi = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  left_join(all_school_tri_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "0.25mi")  %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(TRI_025mi  = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  left_join(all_school_tri_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "0.5mi")   %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(TRI_05mi   = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  left_join(all_school_tri_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "1mi")     %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(TRI_1mi    = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%

  # --- All Pollution Sites ---
  left_join(all_school_all_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "0.125mi") %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(All_Pollution_Sites_0125mi = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  left_join(all_school_all_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "0.25mi")  %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(All_Pollution_Sites_025mi  = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  left_join(all_school_all_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "0.5mi")   %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(All_Pollution_Sites_05mi   = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%
  left_join(all_school_all_pairs %>% filter(buffer_distance == "1mi")     %>% distinct(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(All_Pollution_Sites_1mi    = 1), by = "SCHOOL_ID") %>%

  # Fill all NAs with 0 — schools with no nearby sites get 0 for that indicator
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~replace_na(., 0)))

# --- 4. Join proximity indicators onto school base dataset ---
school_level_pollution_proximity <- school_base %>%
  left_join(proximity_indicators, by = "SCHOOL_ID")

# --- 5. Export to CSV ---
write.csv(school_level_pollution_proximity, "Data/Newly Built/school_level_pollution_proximity.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("Rows:", nrow(school_level_pollution_proximity), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(school_level_pollution_proximity), "\n")
print(head(school_level_pollution_proximity))

```

# Figures and Tables
```{r}
# =========================================
# Figure 1: Public vs Private
# =========================================

# High Risk Sites (Public vs Private Comparison)

# Combine public and private schools into one table
all_schools_with_type <- bind_rows(
  public_school_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(school_type = "Public"),
  private_school_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SCHOOL_ID) %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
)

# Join to all_school_all_pairs into a new object
all_school_all_pairs_with_type <- all_school_all_pairs %>%
  left_join(all_schools_with_type, by = "SCHOOL_ID")

# Optional: check for missing school types
missing_types <- all_school_all_pairs_with_type %>% filter(is.na(school_type))
if(nrow(missing_types) > 0){
  warning(paste("There are", nrow(missing_types), "schools without a type!"))
}

# Compute proximity to high-risk sites and summarize
school_level_by_type <- all_school_all_pairs_with_type %>%
  left_join(
    all_pollution_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
    by = "SITE_ID"
  ) %>%
  mutate(HighRisk_flag = ifelse(is.na(HighRisk_flag), FALSE, HighRisk_flag)) %>%
  group_by(buffer_distance, SCHOOL_ID, school_type) %>%
  summarise(any_highrisk = any(HighRisk_flag), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(buffer_distance, any_highrisk, school_type) %>%
  summarise(n_schools = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    prop_unique = case_when(
      school_type == "Public" ~ round(n_schools / n_public, 2),
      school_type == "Private" ~ round(n_schools / n_private, 2)
    ),
    interpretation = ifelse(any_highrisk,
                            "Schools with ≥1 high-risk site nearby",
                            "Schools with 0 high-risk sites nearby")
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

print(school_level_by_type)

# Prepare higher-risk public vs private data for plotting
highrisk_plot_data <- school_level_by_type %>%
  filter(any_highrisk == TRUE) %>%   # only schools near high-risk sites
  mutate(
    school_type = factor(school_type, levels = c("Public", "Private")),
    source = "Higher-Risk Sites"    # optional label if you want facets
  )

# PLOT BOTH ALL SITES AND HIGHER RISK SITES

# 1️⃣ Add a 'source' column to both datasets
combined_national_public_private_all <- bind_rows(
  combined_national_public %>% mutate(school_type = "Public"),
  combined_national_private %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
) %>%
  filter(source == "All Pollution Sites") %>%
  mutate(school_type = factor(school_type, levels = c("Public", "Private"))) %>%
  mutate(source = "All Pollution Sites")

highrisk_plot_data <- highrisk_plot_data %>%
  mutate(source = "Higher-Risk Sites")

# 2️⃣ Combine both datasets
combined_plot_data <- bind_rows(
  combined_national_public_private_all,
  highrisk_plot_data
)

# 3️⃣ Plot faceted by 'source' for side-by-side comparison
fig1 <- 
ggplot(combined_plot_data, aes(x = buffer_distance, y = prop_unique, fill = school_type)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = scales::percent(prop_unique, accuracy = 1)),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 3.5
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  facet_wrap(~source) +  # separates All Sites vs Higher-Risk
  labs(
    # title = "Proportion of Schools Near Pollution Sites by School Type",
    x = "Distance",
    y = "% of Schools",
    fill = "School Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

print(fig1)

```

```{r}
# =========================================
# Figure 2: Student Composition Near Pollution Sites
# =========================================

# --- Helper function for pivoting & recoding ---
pivot_and_recode <- function(df, col_map, source_name) {
  df %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = names(col_map),
      names_to = "group",
      values_to = "proportion"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      group  = recode(group, !!!col_map),
      source = source_name
    )
}

# --- 1a. Race proportions (All Schools, 0.25mi) ---
race_props <- combined_all %>%
  filter(
    school_type     == "All Schools (Public and Private)",
    site_type       == "All Pollution Sites",
    buffer_distance == "0.25mi"
  ) %>%
  select(prob_Black, prob_Hispanic, prob_Native,
         prob_Hawaiian, prob_Asian, prob_White) %>%
  pivot_and_recode(
    col_map = c(
      prob_Black    = "Black",
      prob_Hispanic = "Hispanic",
      prob_Native   = "Native",
      prob_Hawaiian = "Hawaiian",
      prob_Asian    = "Asian",
      prob_White    = "White"
    ),
    source_name = "Race (All Schools)"
  )

# --- 1b. Program proportions (Public only, 0.25mi) ---
program_props <- combined_public %>%
  filter(
    school_type     == "Public",
    site_type       == "All Pollution Sites",
    buffer_distance == "0.25mi"
  ) %>%
  select(prob_FRL, prob_NonFRL,
         prob_EL, prob_NonEL,
         prob_IDEA, prob_NonIDEA) %>%
  pivot_and_recode(
    col_map = c(
      prob_FRL    = "FRPL",
      prob_NonFRL = "Non-FRPL",
      prob_EL     = "EL",
      prob_NonEL  = "Non-EL",
      prob_IDEA   = "SWD",
      prob_NonIDEA = "Non-SWD"
    ),
    source_name = "Programs (Public Only)"
  )

# --- 1c. Combine into char_df ---
char_df <- bind_rows(race_props, program_props) %>%
  arrange(proportion) %>%
  mutate(group = factor(group, levels = unique(group)))

# --- 2. Count pollution sites per school (for 2+ site bin) ---
# all_school_clean already built in blood lead validation chunk

school_with_sites <- all_school_clean %>%
  left_join(
    bind_rows(
      all_sites_full_public  %>% mutate(school_type = "Public"),
      all_sites_full_private %>% mutate(school_type = "Private")
    ) %>%
      filter(site_type == "All Pollution Sites", buffer_distance == "0.25mi") %>%
      count(SCHOOL_ID, name = "n_sites"),
    by = "SCHOOL_ID"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    n_sites  = replace_na(n_sites, 0),
    site_bin = case_when(
      n_sites >= 2 ~ "2+",
      n_sites == 1 ~ "1",
      TRUE         ~ "0"
    ),
    site_bin = factor(site_bin, levels = c("2+", "1", "0"))
  )

# --- 3. Summarize students by site bin ---
student_props <- school_with_sites %>%
  group_by(school_type, site_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    FRL      = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(FRL_Students_Public_2023_24,                                    na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    NonFRL   = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(Total_Students_Public_2023_24 - FRL_Students_Public_2023_24,   na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    EL       = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(SCH_ENR_EL_TOTAL,                                              na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    NonEL    = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(Total_Students_Public_2023_24 - SCH_ENR_EL_TOTAL,              na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    IDEA     = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(SCH_ENR_IDEA_TOTAL,                                            na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    NonIDEA  = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(Total_Students_Public_2023_24 - SCH_ENR_IDEA_TOTAL,            na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    Black    = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(Black_Students_Public_2023_24,    na.rm = TRUE) else sum(Black_Students_Private_2019_20,    na.rm = TRUE),
    Hispanic = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(Hispanic_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE) else sum(Hispanic_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    Native   = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(Native_Students_Public_2023_24,   na.rm = TRUE) else sum(Native_Students_Private_2019_20,   na.rm = TRUE),
    Hawaiian = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(Hawaiian_Students_Public_2023_24, na.rm = TRUE) else sum(Hawaiian_Students_Private_2019_20, na.rm = TRUE),
    Asian    = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(Asian_Students_Public_2023_24,    na.rm = TRUE) else sum(Asian_Students_Private_2019_20,    na.rm = TRUE),
    White    = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(White_Students_Public_2023_24,    na.rm = TRUE) else sum(White_Students_Private_2019_20,    na.rm = TRUE),
    Total    = if (school_type[1] == "Public") sum(Total_Students_Public_2023_24,    na.rm = TRUE) else sum(Total_Students_Private_2019_20,    na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups  = "drop"
  )

# --- 3a. Combined totals (all schools) ---
combined_props <- student_props %>%
  group_by(site_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    FRL = NA_real_, NonFRL = NA_real_,
    EL  = NA_real_, NonEL  = NA_real_,
    IDEA = NA_real_, NonIDEA = NA_real_,
    Black    = sum(Black,    na.rm = TRUE),
    Hispanic = sum(Hispanic, na.rm = TRUE),
    Native   = sum(Native,   na.rm = TRUE),
    Hawaiian = sum(Hawaiian, na.rm = TRUE),
    Asian    = sum(Asian,    na.rm = TRUE),
    White    = sum(White,    na.rm = TRUE),
    Total    = sum(Total,    na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(school_type = "All Schools")

# --- 4a. Race props for 2+ sites (all schools) ---
race_2plus <- combined_props %>%
  filter(site_bin == "2+") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = Black:White, names_to = "group", values_to = "count") %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  mutate(prop = count / sum(combined_props[[group]], na.rm = TRUE) * 100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(source = "Race (All Schools)")

# --- 4b. Program props for 2+ sites (public only) ---
program_2plus <- student_props %>%
  filter(site_bin == "2+", school_type == "Public") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(FRL, NonFRL, EL, NonEL, IDEA, NonIDEA),
               names_to = "group", values_to = "count") %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  mutate(prop = count / sum(student_props[[group]], na.rm = TRUE) * 100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    group = recode(group,
                   FRL     = "FRPL",    NonFRL  = "Non-FRPL",
                   EL      = "EL",      NonEL   = "Non-EL",
                   IDEA    = "SWD",     NonIDEA = "Non-SWD"),
    source = "Programs (Public Only)"
  )

# --- 4c. Combine into char_df_2plus ---
char_df_2plus <- bind_rows(race_2plus, program_2plus) %>%
  arrange(prop) %>%
  mutate(group = factor(group, levels = unique(group)))

# =========================================
# Figure 2A & 2B: PNAS Split Figures
# =========================================

# --- 1. Build combined dataset ---
combined_quarter_twoplus_df_PNAS <- bind_rows(
  char_df %>%
    mutate(scenario = "within 0.25 miles of any site", value = proportion),
  char_df_2plus %>%
    mutate(scenario = "within 0.25 miles of 2+ sites", value = prop / 100)
)

# --- 2. Define analytic structure ---
# Assign category labels, reference group flags, and round values for display
combined_quarter_twoplus_df_PNAS <- combined_quarter_twoplus_df_PNAS %>%
  mutate(
    category = case_when(
      group %in% c("Black","Hispanic","Native","Hawaiian","Asian","White") ~ "Race",
      group %in% c("FRPL","Non-FRPL")                                      ~ "FRPL",
      group %in% c("EL","Non-EL")                                          ~ "EL",
      group %in% c("SWD","Non-SWD")                                        ~ "SWD"
    ),
    is_ref        = group %in% c("White","Non-FRPL","Non-EL","Non-SWD"),
    scenario      = factor(scenario, levels = c("within 0.25 miles of any site",
                                                "within 0.25 miles of 2+ sites")),
    value_rounded = round(value, 3)
  )

# --- 3. Get reference values using rounded values ---
ref_white_any   <- combined_quarter_twoplus_df_PNAS %>% filter(group == "White",    scenario == "within 0.25 miles of any site") %>% pull(value_rounded)
ref_white_2plus <- combined_quarter_twoplus_df_PNAS %>% filter(group == "White",    scenario == "within 0.25 miles of 2+ sites") %>% pull(value_rounded)
ref_frpl_any    <- combined_quarter_twoplus_df_PNAS %>% filter(group == "Non-FRPL", scenario == "within 0.25 miles of any site") %>% pull(value_rounded)
ref_frpl_2plus  <- combined_quarter_twoplus_df_PNAS %>% filter(group == "Non-FRPL", scenario == "within 0.25 miles of 2+ sites") %>% pull(value_rounded)
ref_el_any      <- combined_quarter_twoplus_df_PNAS %>% filter(group == "Non-EL",   scenario == "within 0.25 miles of any site") %>% pull(value_rounded)
ref_el_2plus    <- combined_quarter_twoplus_df_PNAS %>% filter(group == "Non-EL",   scenario == "within 0.25 miles of 2+ sites") %>% pull(value_rounded)
ref_swd_any     <- combined_quarter_twoplus_df_PNAS %>% filter(group == "Non-SWD",  scenario == "within 0.25 miles of any site") %>% pull(value_rounded)
ref_swd_2plus   <- combined_quarter_twoplus_df_PNAS %>% filter(group == "Non-SWD",  scenario == "within 0.25 miles of 2+ sites") %>% pull(value_rounded)

# --- 4. Compute disparity ratios from rounded values ---
# Ratios computed from same rounded values shown on bar labels for consistency
disparity_ratios <- combined_quarter_twoplus_df_PNAS %>%
  mutate(
    disparity_ratio = case_when(
      is_ref ~ NA_real_,
      category == "Race" & scenario == "within 0.25 miles of any site"  ~ round(value_rounded / ref_white_any,   2),
      category == "Race" & scenario == "within 0.25 miles of 2+ sites"  ~ round(value_rounded / ref_white_2plus,  2),
      category == "FRPL" & scenario == "within 0.25 miles of any site"  ~ round(value_rounded / ref_frpl_any,    2),
      category == "FRPL" & scenario == "within 0.25 miles of 2+ sites"  ~ round(value_rounded / ref_frpl_2plus,   2),
      category == "EL"   & scenario == "within 0.25 miles of any site"  ~ round(value_rounded / ref_el_any,      2),
      category == "EL"   & scenario == "within 0.25 miles of 2+ sites"  ~ round(value_rounded / ref_el_2plus,     2),
      category == "SWD"  & scenario == "within 0.25 miles of any site"  ~ round(value_rounded / ref_swd_any,     2),
      category == "SWD"  & scenario == "within 0.25 miles of 2+ sites"  ~ round(value_rounded / ref_swd_2plus,    2)
    )
  )

# --- 5. Order race groups low to high by "any site" value, keeping White first ---
race_order <- disparity_ratios %>%
  filter(category == "Race", scenario == "within 0.25 miles of any site", !is_ref) %>%
  arrange(value_rounded) %>%
  pull(group) %>%
  as.character()

group_levels <- c("White", race_order,
                  "Non-FRPL", "FRPL",
                  "Non-EL",   "EL",
                  "Non-SWD",  "SWD")

disparity_ratios <- disparity_ratios %>%
  mutate(group = factor(group, levels = group_levels))

# =========================================
# Figure 2A: Within 0.25 miles of any site
# Y axis: 0-12% in 3% intervals
# =========================================

plot_data_2a <- disparity_ratios %>%
  filter(scenario == "within 0.25 miles of any site") %>%
  mutate(
    fill_group = factor(
      ifelse(is_ref, "Reference group", "Comparison group"),
      levels = c("Reference group", "Comparison group")
    )
  )

ratio_labels_2a <- plot_data_2a %>%
  filter(!is.na(disparity_ratio)) %>%
  group_by(category, group) %>%
  summarise(
    label_y         = value + 0.03,
    disparity_ratio = disparity_ratio,
    .groups         = "drop"
  )

fig2a <- ggplot(plot_data_2a, aes(x = group, y = value, fill = fill_group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.45) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = scales::percent(value_rounded, accuracy = 0.1)),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size  = 2.5
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data        = ratio_labels_2a,
    aes(x = group, y = label_y, label = paste0(disparity_ratio, "x")),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    vjust       = -0.3,
    size        = 3.0,
    color       = "gray20",
    fontface    = "bold.italic"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~category, scales = "free_x",
           labeller = as_labeller(c(
             "Race" = "Race",
             "FRPL" = "Free or Reduced-Price Lunch (FRPL)",
             "EL"   = "English Learner (EL)",
             "SWD"  = "Students with Disabilities (SWD)"
           ))) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 0.12, by = 0.03),
    limits = c(0, 0.16),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Reference group" = "#1b9e77", "Comparison group" = "#a6dba0")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "% of Students", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8)
  )

# =========================================
# Figure 2B: Within 0.25 miles of 2+ sites
# Y axis: 0-5% in 1% intervals
# =========================================

plot_data_2b <- disparity_ratios %>%
  filter(scenario == "within 0.25 miles of 2+ sites") %>%
  mutate(
    fill_group = factor(
      ifelse(is_ref, "Reference group", "Comparison group"),
      levels = c("Reference group", "Comparison group")
    )
  )

ratio_labels_2b <- plot_data_2b %>%
  filter(!is.na(disparity_ratio)) %>%
  group_by(category, group) %>%
  summarise(
    label_y         = value + 0.008,
    disparity_ratio = disparity_ratio,
    .groups         = "drop"
  )

fig2b <- ggplot(plot_data_2b, aes(x = group, y = value, fill = fill_group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.45) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = scales::percent(value_rounded, accuracy = 0.1)),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size  = 2.5
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data        = ratio_labels_2b,
    aes(x = group, y = label_y, label = paste0(disparity_ratio, "x")),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    vjust       = -0.3,
    size        = 3.0,
    color       = "gray20",
    fontface    = "bold.italic"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~category, scales = "free_x",
           labeller = as_labeller(c(
             "Race" = "Race",
             "FRPL" = "Free or Reduced-Price Lunch (FRPL)",
             "EL"   = "English Learner (EL)",
             "SWD"  = "Students with Disabilities (SWD)"
           ))) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 0.05, by = 0.01),
    limits = c(0, 0.08),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Reference group" = "#d95f02", "Comparison group" = "#fddbc7")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "% of Students", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8)
  )

print(fig2a)
print(fig2b)

```

```{r}
# =========================================
# Figure 3: Choropleth Map — Schools Within Quarter Mile of Pollution Sites
# Also computes:
#   - Region-level summary aggregating proportions across Census regions (region_summary)
#   - Flags non-state entities excluded from regional groupings
# Note: quarter_mile_summary and total_schools_state built in blood lead validation chunk
# =========================================

# Plot the choropleth
quarter_mile_summary <- quarter_mile_summary %>%
  mutate(
    prop_band = case_when(
      prop_near_site < 0.05 ~ "< 5%",
      prop_near_site < 0.10 ~ "5-10%",
      prop_near_site < 0.15 ~ "10-15%",
      prop_near_site < 0.20 ~ "15-20%",
      TRUE                  ~ ">=20%"
    ),
    prop_band = factor(prop_band, levels = c("< 5%", "5-10%", "10-15%", "15-20%", ">=20%"))
  )

fig3 <- 
plot_usmap(data = quarter_mile_summary, values = "prop_band") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "< 5%"   = "#c6dbef",
      "5-10%"  = "#6baed6",
      "10-15%" = "#2171b5",
      "15-20%" = "#084594",
      ">=20%"   = "#08306b"
    ),
    name = "% of Schools in Each State (Public + Private)\nWithin a Quarter Mile of a Pollution Site"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title      = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  labs(title = "")

# Region Summary
state_regions <- tibble(
  STATE = c(
    # Northeast
    "CT", "ME", "MA", "NH", "RI", "VT", "NJ", "NY", "PA",
    # Midwest
    "IL", "IN", "MI", "OH", "WI", "IA", "KS", "MN", "MO", "NE", "ND", "SD",
    # South
    "DE", "DC", "FL", "GA", "MD", "NC", "SC", "VA", "WV", "AL", "KY", "MS", "TN", "AR", "LA", "OK", "TX",
    # West
    "AZ", "CO", "ID", "MT", "NV", "NM", "UT", "WY", "AK", "CA", "HI", "OR", "WA"
  ),
  REGION = c(
    # Northeast
    rep("Northeast", 9),
    # Midwest
    rep("Midwest", 12),
    # South
    rep("South", 17),
    # West
    rep("West", 13)
  )
)

quarter_mile_summary_region <- quarter_mile_summary %>%
  left_join(state_regions, by = c("state" = "STATE"))

region_summary <- quarter_mile_summary_region %>%
  group_by(REGION) %>%
  summarise(
    schools_near_site = sum(unique_schools),
    total_schools     = sum(total_schools),
    prop_near_site    = schools_near_site / total_schools,
    .groups           = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print()

# Identify places with missing region
quarter_mile_summary_region %>%
  filter(is.na(REGION)) %>%
  select(state, unique_schools, total_schools) %>%
  print()

print(fig3)

```

```{r}
# =========================================
# Figure 4: Pollution Site Density and Proximity to Schools by State
# =========================================

# =========================================
# 1. Clean and Standardize State Info in Pollution Sites
# =========================================

all_pollution_sf_clean <- all_pollution_sf %>%
  mutate(
    state = coalesce(X8..ST, STATE, State),
    state = toupper(trimws(state))
  )

# Identify invalid state codes
invalid_states <- all_pollution_sf_clean %>%
  filter(!state %in% c(state.abb, "DC", "PR")) %>%
  distinct(state)

if(nrow(invalid_states) == 0) {
  message("No invalid state codes found. All states are valid.")
} else {
  message("Invalid state codes found:")
  print(invalid_states)
}

# Keep only valid states + DC + PR
valid_states <- c(state.abb, "DC", "PR")
sites_in_states <- all_pollution_sf_clean %>%
  filter(state %in% valid_states)

# =========================================
# 2. Prepare Population Data
# =========================================

data(statepop)

statepop_clean <- statepop %>%
  transmute(
    state      = toupper(abbr),
    population = pop_2022
  )

# =========================================
# 3. Compute Total Sites per State and Per Capita Metrics
# =========================================

state_counts <- sites_in_states %>%
  count(state, name = "site_count")

if(nrow(state_counts) == 0) {
  message("No states have pollution sites. Exiting early.")
} else {
  sites_per_capita <- state_counts %>%
    left_join(statepop_clean, by = "state") %>%
    mutate(
      sites_per_100k = (site_count / population) * 100000
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(sites_per_100k))

  if(nrow(sites_per_capita) == 0) {
    message("No states with population-adjusted site counts.")
  } else {
    message("Top 5 states by total sites per 100k:")
    print(head(sites_per_capita, 5))
  }
}

# =========================================
# 4. Assign State Info to School-Site Pairs and Count Unique Sites
# =========================================

all_school_all_pairs_state <- all_school_all_pairs %>%
  left_join(
    all_pollution_sf_clean %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, state),
    by = "SITE_ID"
  )

state_unique_sites <- all_school_all_pairs_state %>%
  filter(buffer_distance == "0.25mi") %>%
  distinct(state, SITE_ID) %>%
  count(state, name = "unique_sites_near_schools")

if(nrow(state_unique_sites) == 0) {
  message("No pollution sites within 0.25 mile of any school.")
}

state_unique_sites_pop <- state_unique_sites %>%
  left_join(statepop_clean, by = "state") %>%
  mutate(
    sites_near_schools_per_100k = (unique_sites_near_schools / population) * 100000
  )

# =========================================
# 5. Merge All Metrics and Compute Proportions
# =========================================

final_state_df <- sites_per_capita %>%
  left_join(state_unique_sites_pop, by = "state") %>%
  mutate(
    prop_near_schools = sites_near_schools_per_100k / sites_per_100k
  )

# National average proportion for reference line
avg_prop <- sum(final_state_df$sites_near_schools_per_100k, na.rm = TRUE) /
            sum(final_state_df$sites_per_100k, na.rm = TRUE)

message(sprintf("National average proportion of sites within 0.25 mi of schools: %.2f", avg_prop))

# =========================================
# 6. Add State Names and Density Data
# Note: state_crosswalk already built in blood lead validation chunk
# =========================================

state_density <- read.csv("Data/Misc/state_density.csv")

final_state_df <- final_state_df %>%
  left_join(state_crosswalk, by = c("state" = "state_abbrev")) %>%
  left_join(state_density, by = c("state_name" = "State")) %>%
  mutate(Density = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Density)))

# =========================================
# 7. Scatter Plot: Sites per 100k vs Sites Near Schools per 100k
# =========================================

if(nrow(final_state_df) == 0) {
  message("No data available for plotting.")
} else {

  # Create discrete density bands for cleaner color legend
  final_state_df <- final_state_df %>%
    mutate(
      density_band = case_when(
        Density <   50 ~ "< 50",
        Density <  200 ~ "50-200",
        Density <  500 ~ "200-500",
        Density < 1000 ~ "500-1,000",
        TRUE           ~ "≥1,000"
      ),
      density_band = factor(density_band, levels = c("< 50", "50-200", "200-500", "500-1,000", "≥1,000"))
    )

fig4 <- 
  ggplot(final_state_df, aes(
    x     = sites_per_100k,
    y     = sites_near_schools_per_100k,
    label = state,
    color = density_band
  )) +
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    geom_text_repel(
      size          = 3,
      fontface      = "bold",
      max.overlaps  = Inf,
      box.padding   = 0.4,
      point.padding = 0.3,
      segment.color = "grey70",
      segment.size  = 0.3
    ) +
    geom_abline(slope = avg_prop, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "< 50"      = "#9ecae1",
        "50-200"    = "#6baed6",
        "200-500"   = "#2171b5",
        "500-1,000" = "#084594",
        "≥1,000"    = "#08306b"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      x        = "Total Pollution Sites per 100,000 People",
      y        = "Sites Within 0.25 Mile of a School\nper 100,000 People",
      color    = "Population Density\n(people per sq. mile)",
      # title    = "Pollution Sites vs Proximity to Schools by State",
      # subtitle = "Dashed red line = national average proportion of sites within 0.25 mile of schools"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title      = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle   = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "right"
    )
}

print(fig4)

```

```{r}
# =========================================
# State-Level Summary Table (requested by Grace, 4/21/26)
# Combines Figure 4 state metrics with school urbanicity breakdown
# Includes: population, area, total pollution sites, sites within 0.25mi
# of a school, and % of schools in each urbanicity category by state
# =========================================

state_summary_table <- final_state_df %>% 
  select(state, site_count, unique_sites_near_schools, population.x, Density)

state_summary_table <- state_summary_table %>%
  mutate(
    area_sq_miles = population.x / Density
  )

state_summary_table <- state_summary_table %>%
  transmute(
    state,
    population = population.x,
    area_sq_miles,
    total_pollution_sites = site_count,
    sites_within_0.25mi_school = unique_sites_near_schools
  ) %>%
  arrange((state)) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()

# calculate percentage of schools by urbanicity in each state

school_urban <- all_school_clean %>%
  group_by(STATE, urbanicity) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

school_urban_pct <- school_urban %>%
  group_by(STATE) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(n / sum(n), 2)) %>%
  ungroup()

school_urban_wide <- school_urban_pct %>%
  select(STATE, urbanicity, pct) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = urbanicity,
    values_from = pct,
    values_fill = 0
  )

state_summary_table <- state_summary_table %>%
  left_join(school_urban_wide, by = c("state" = "STATE"))

print(state_summary_table)

write.csv(state_summary_table, "Data/Newly Built/state_summary_table.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
# Wisconsin and Indiana site counts by type (requested by Grace, 5/11/26)
all_pollution_sf_clean %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  filter(state %in% c("WI", "IN")) %>%
  count(state, site_type, name = "total_sites")

# Within 0.25mi of a school by site type for WI and IN
bind_rows(
  all_school_superfund_pairs,
  all_school_brownfield_pairs,
  all_school_tri_pairs
) %>%
  filter(buffer_distance == "0.25mi") %>%
  left_join(
    all_pollution_sf_clean %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, state),
    by = "SITE_ID"
  ) %>%
  filter(state %in% c("WI", "IN")) %>%
  distinct(SITE_ID, state, site_type) %>%
  count(state, site_type, name = "sites_within_025mi_schools")

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Table 1. Schools Near Environmental Hazard Sites
# Counts and proportions of schools near all sites and high-risk sites
# by school type (All, Public, Private) and buffer distance
# ============================================================

# --- All Sites ---
table1_allsites <- bind_rows(
  # All schools
  all_all_summary$national %>%
    mutate(school_type = "All",
           prop_unique = round(unique_schools / n_all, 2)),

  # Public schools
  all_public_summary$national %>%
    mutate(school_type = "Public",
           prop_unique = round(unique_schools / n_public, 2)),

  # Private schools
  all_private_summary$national %>%
    mutate(school_type = "Private",
           prop_unique = round(unique_schools / n_private, 2))
) %>%
  select(school_type, buffer_distance, unique_schools, prop_unique) %>%
  rename(schools_near_all = unique_schools, prop_near_all = prop_unique)

# --- High-Risk Sites ---
table1_highrisk <- bind_rows(
  # All schools
  school_level_all %>%
    filter(any_highrisk == TRUE) %>%
    mutate(school_type = "All",
           prop_unique = round(n_schools / n_all, 2)) %>%
    select(school_type, buffer_distance, n_schools, prop_unique),

  # Public and Private schools
  school_level_by_type %>%
    filter(any_highrisk == TRUE) %>%
    mutate(prop_unique = case_when(
      school_type == "Public"  ~ round(n_schools / n_public,  2),
      school_type == "Private" ~ round(n_schools / n_private, 2)
    )) %>%
    select(school_type, buffer_distance, n_schools, prop_unique)
) %>%
  rename(schools_near_hr = n_schools, prop_near_hr = prop_unique)

# --- Combine into Table 1 ---
table1 <- table1_allsites %>%
  left_join(table1_highrisk, by = c("school_type", "buffer_distance")) %>%
  mutate(school_type = factor(school_type, levels = c("All", "Public", "Private"))) %>%
  arrange(school_type, buffer_distance)

print(table1)

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Appendix Table A2. Student Enrollment and FTE Staff Counts
# By school type and distance for all hazard sites
# Values come from combined_all, combined_public, combined_private
# Non-instructional staff estimated at 1.046x FTE teachers (see Appendix B1)
# ============================================================

table_a2 <- bind_rows(
  combined_all %>%
    filter(site_type == "All Pollution Sites",
           buffer_distance != "All Schools"),

  combined_public %>%
    filter(site_type == "All Pollution Sites",
           buffer_distance != "All Schools"),

  combined_private %>%
    filter(site_type == "All Pollution Sites",
           buffer_distance != "All Schools")
) %>%
  mutate(
    total_noninstr_staff = round(total_teachers * 1.046),
    total_staff_students = total_enrollment + total_teachers + total_noninstr_staff,
    school_type          = factor(school_type, levels = c("All Schools (Public and Private)", "Public", "Private"))
  ) %>%
  select(school_type, buffer_distance, total_enrollment, total_teachers,
         total_noninstr_staff, total_staff_students) %>%
  arrange(school_type, buffer_distance)

print(table_a2)

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Appendix Table A3. Disparity Ratios by Race
# Proximity to Known Environmental Hazard Sites
# Values from exposure_ratios built in Step 8
# ============================================================

table_a3 <- bind_rows(
  combined_public,
  combined_private,
  combined_all
) %>%
  filter(site_type == "All Pollution Sites") %>%
  mutate(
    Distance          = factor(buffer_distance, levels = c("0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi")),
    Black_vs_White    = round(prob_Black    / prob_White, 2),
    Hispanic_vs_White = round(prob_Hispanic / prob_White, 2),
    Native_vs_White   = round(prob_Native   / prob_White, 2),
    Hawaiian_vs_White = round(prob_Hawaiian / prob_White, 2),
    Asian_vs_White    = round(prob_Asian    / prob_White, 2),
    school_type       = factor(school_type, levels = c("All Schools (Public and Private)", "Public", "Private"))
  ) %>%
  select(school_type, Distance, Black_vs_White, Hispanic_vs_White,
         Native_vs_White, Hawaiian_vs_White, Asian_vs_White) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Distance)) %>%
  arrange(school_type, Distance)

print(table_a3)

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Appendix Table A4. Public School Disparity Ratios by Program
# Proximity to Known Environmental Hazard Sites
# Public schools only — FRPL, EL, SWD data not available for private
# Values from combined_public built in Step 8
# ============================================================

table_a4 <- combined_public %>%
  filter(
    site_type       == "All Pollution Sites",
    school_type     == "Public",
    !is.na(buffer_distance),
    buffer_distance != "All Schools"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Distance      = factor(buffer_distance, levels = c("0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi")),
    FRPL_vs_NonFRL = round(prob_FRL  / prob_NonFRL,  2),
    EL_vs_NonEL   = round(prob_EL   / prob_NonEL,   2),
    SWD_vs_NonSWD = round(prob_IDEA / prob_NonIDEA,  2)
  ) %>%
  select(Distance, FRPL_vs_NonFRL, EL_vs_NonEL, SWD_vs_NonSWD) %>%
  arrange(Distance)

print(table_a4)

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Appendix Table A5. Disparity Ratios by Race
# Proximity to Higher-Risk Environmental Hazard Sites
# Values from combined_public_hr, combined_private_hr, combined_all_hr
# ============================================================

table_a5 <- bind_rows(
  combined_public_hr,
  combined_private_hr,
  combined_all_hr
) %>%
  filter(
    site_type       == "All Pollution Sites",
    !is.na(buffer_distance),
    buffer_distance != "All Schools"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Distance          = factor(buffer_distance, levels = c("0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi")),
    Black_vs_White    = round(prob_Black    / prob_White, 2),
    Hispanic_vs_White = round(prob_Hispanic / prob_White, 2),
    Native_vs_White   = round(prob_Native   / prob_White, 2),
    Hawaiian_vs_White = round(prob_Hawaiian / prob_White, 2),
    Asian_vs_White    = round(prob_Asian    / prob_White, 2),
    school_type       = factor(school_type, levels = c("All Schools (Public and Private)", "Public", "Private"))
  ) %>%
  select(school_type, Distance, Black_vs_White, Hispanic_vs_White,
         Native_vs_White, Hawaiian_vs_White, Asian_vs_White) %>%
  arrange(school_type, Distance)

print(table_a5)

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Appendix Table A6. Public School Disparity Ratios by Program
# Proximity to Higher-Risk Environmental Hazard Sites
# Public schools only — FRPL, EL, SWD data not available for private
# Values from combined_public_hr built in high-risk section
# ============================================================

table_a6 <- combined_public_hr %>%
  filter(
    site_type       == "All Pollution Sites",
    school_type     == "Public",
    !is.na(buffer_distance),
    buffer_distance != "All Schools"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Distance       = factor(buffer_distance, levels = c("0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi")),
    FRPL_vs_NonFRL = round(prob_FRL  / prob_NonFRL,  2),
    EL_vs_NonEL   = round(prob_EL   / prob_NonEL,   2),
    SWD_vs_NonSWD = round(prob_IDEA / prob_NonIDEA,  2)
  ) %>%
  select(Distance, FRPL_vs_NonFRL, EL_vs_NonEL, SWD_vs_NonSWD) %>%
  arrange(Distance)

print(table_a6)

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Appendix Table A7. Proportion of Schools Near Any Pollution
# Site by Distance and State, with State Rankings
# ============================================================

# --- 1. Build long summary across all distances ---
all_distance_summary <- all_all_summary$state %>%
  left_join(total_schools_state, by = "STATE") %>%
  mutate(prop_near_site = round(unique_schools / total_schools, 4)) %>%
  rename(state = STATE) %>%
  select(state, buffer_distance, unique_schools, total_schools, prop_near_site) %>%
  arrange(state, buffer_distance)

# --- 2. Extended crosswalk to include non-state entities ---
full_crosswalk <- bind_rows(
  tibble(state_abbrev = state.abb, state_name = state.name),
  tibble(
    state_abbrev = c("DC", "PR", "VI", "MP", "BI"),
    state_name   = c("District of Columbia", "Puerto Rico", "U.S. Virgin Islands",
                     "Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands", "Bureau of Indian Education")
  )
)

# --- 3. Non-state rows excluded from ranking ---
non_states <- c("District of Columbia", "Bureau of Indian Education",
                "Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands",
                "Puerto Rico", "U.S. Virgin Islands")

# --- 4. Pivot wide, join full state names, and add rankings ---
# Non-states are set to NA before ranking so they don't consume rank positions
# rank() with na.last = "keep" skips NAs and only ranks the 50 states
all_distance_summary_wide_ranked <- all_distance_summary %>%
  select(state, buffer_distance, prop_near_site) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = buffer_distance,
    values_from = prop_near_site
  ) %>%
  left_join(full_crosswalk, by = c("state" = "state_abbrev")) %>%
  mutate(
    state_name  = ifelse(is.na(state_name), state, state_name),
    # Set non-state values to NA so they are excluded from ranking
    rank_0125mi = ifelse(state_name %in% non_states, NA_real_, `0.125mi`),
    rank_025mi  = ifelse(state_name %in% non_states, NA_real_, `0.25mi`),
    rank_05mi   = ifelse(state_name %in% non_states, NA_real_, `0.5mi`),
    rank_1mi    = ifelse(state_name %in% non_states, NA_real_, `1mi`),
    # Rank among states only (1 = highest proportion)
    rank_0125mi = ifelse(state_name %in% non_states, NA, rank(-rank_0125mi, ties.method = "min", na.last = "keep")),
    rank_025mi  = ifelse(state_name %in% non_states, NA, rank(-rank_025mi,  ties.method = "min", na.last = "keep")),
    rank_05mi   = ifelse(state_name %in% non_states, NA, rank(-rank_05mi,   ties.method = "min", na.last = "keep")),
    rank_1mi    = ifelse(state_name %in% non_states, NA, rank(-rank_1mi,    ties.method = "min", na.last = "keep")),
    # Combine prop and rank into one display column
    `0.125mi_display` = ifelse(is.na(rank_0125mi), as.character(`0.125mi`), paste0(`0.125mi`, " (", rank_0125mi, ")")),
    `0.25mi_display`  = ifelse(is.na(rank_025mi),  as.character(`0.25mi`),  paste0(`0.25mi`,  " (", rank_025mi,  ")")),
    `0.5mi_display`   = ifelse(is.na(rank_05mi),   as.character(`0.5mi`),   paste0(`0.5mi`,   " (", rank_05mi,   ")")),
    `1mi_display`     = ifelse(is.na(rank_1mi),    as.character(`1mi`),     paste0(`1mi`,     " (", rank_1mi,    ")"))
  ) %>%
  select(state_name, `0.125mi_display`, `0.25mi_display`, `0.5mi_display`, `1mi_display`) %>%
  arrange(state_name)

print(all_distance_summary_wide_ranked)
write.csv(all_distance_summary_wide_ranked, "Data/Newly Built/table_a7_ranked.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Appendix Table A8. Sites per 100,000 Residents by State
# ============================================================

sites_per_capita %>%
  left_join(state_crosswalk, by = c("state" = "state_abbrev")) %>%
  mutate(
    state_name     = ifelse(is.na(state_name), state, state_name),
    sites_per_100k = round(sites_per_100k, 1)
  ) %>%
  select(state_name, site_count, population, sites_per_100k) %>%
  arrange(state_name) %>%
  print()

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Appendix Tables A9 and A10
# Site-centered proximity summaries with urbanicity breakdown
# A9: All sites | A10: High-risk sites only
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# APPENDIX TABLE A9
# Proportion of Known Environmental Hazard Sites within
# Indicated Distance of at Least One School, with Urbanicity Breakdown
# ============================================================

# --- 1. Summarize site-centered proximity (Prop. All) ---
summarize_sites_from_pairs <- function(pairs_df, sites_sf) {
  pairs_df %>%
    group_by(buffer_distance) %>%
    summarise(
      unique_sites_with_schools = n_distinct(SITE_ID),
      total_intersections       = n(),
      .groups                   = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      prop_sites  = round(unique_sites_with_schools / nrow(sites_sf), 3),
      total_sites = nrow(sites_sf)
    )
}

tri_site_summary        <- summarize_sites_from_pairs(all_school_tri_pairs,        tri_sf)
superfund_site_summary  <- summarize_sites_from_pairs(all_school_superfund_pairs,  superfund_sf)
brownfield_site_summary <- summarize_sites_from_pairs(all_school_brownfield_pairs, brownfield_sf)
all_site_summary        <- summarize_sites_from_pairs(all_school_all_pairs,        all_pollution_sf)

combined_national_sites <- bind_rows(
  superfund_site_summary  %>% mutate(dataset = "Superfund"),
  brownfield_site_summary %>% mutate(dataset = "Brownfield"),
  tri_site_summary        %>% mutate(dataset = "TRI"),
  all_site_summary        %>% mutate(dataset = "All Pollution Sites")
) %>%
  select(dataset, buffer_distance, unique_sites_with_schools, total_sites, prop_sites)

# --- 2. Join urbanicity breakdown from site_urbanicity_summary_wide ---
table_a9_full <- combined_national_sites %>%
  left_join(
    site_urbanicity_summary_wide %>%
      select(dataset, buffer_distance, city, suburban, town, rural),
    by = c("dataset", "buffer_distance")
  ) %>%
  arrange(dataset, buffer_distance)

print(table_a9_full)
write.csv(table_a9_full, "Data/Newly Built/table_a9_full.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ============================================================
# APPENDIX TABLE A10 (HIGH-RISK VERSION)
# Replicates A9 logic but filtered to high-risk sites only
# ============================================================

# --- 1. Filter pair datasets to high-risk sites only ---
hr_superfund_pairs <- all_school_superfund_pairs %>%
  left_join(superfund_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
            by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE)

hr_brownfield_pairs <- all_school_brownfield_pairs %>%
  left_join(brownfield_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
            by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE)

hr_tri_pairs <- all_school_tri_pairs %>%
  left_join(tri_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
            by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE)

hr_all_pairs <- all_school_all_pairs %>%
  left_join(all_pollution_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(SITE_ID, HighRisk_flag),
            by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE)

# --- 2. Total high-risk sites by type (denominators for Prop. All) ---
total_hr_superfund  <- superfund_highrisk_sf  %>% filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>% nrow()
total_hr_brownfield <- brownfield_highrisk_sf %>% filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>% nrow()
total_hr_tri        <- tri_highrisk_sf        %>% filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>% nrow()
total_hr_all        <- all_pollution_highrisk_sf %>% filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>% nrow()

# --- 3. Overall counts and props ---
hr_overall_summary <- bind_rows(
  hr_superfund_pairs  %>% group_by(buffer_distance) %>% summarise(sites_near_schools = n_distinct(SITE_ID), .groups = "drop") %>% mutate(dataset = "Superfund",          total_sites = total_hr_superfund),
  hr_brownfield_pairs %>% group_by(buffer_distance) %>% summarise(sites_near_schools = n_distinct(SITE_ID), .groups = "drop") %>% mutate(dataset = "Brownfield",         total_sites = total_hr_brownfield),
  hr_tri_pairs        %>% group_by(buffer_distance) %>% summarise(sites_near_schools = n_distinct(SITE_ID), .groups = "drop") %>% mutate(dataset = "TRI",                 total_sites = total_hr_tri),
  hr_all_pairs        %>% group_by(buffer_distance) %>% summarise(sites_near_schools = n_distinct(SITE_ID), .groups = "drop") %>% mutate(dataset = "All Pollution Sites", total_sites = total_hr_all)
) %>%
  mutate(prop_all = round(sites_near_schools / total_sites, 3)) %>%
  select(dataset, buffer_distance, sites_near_schools, total_sites, prop_all)

# --- 4. Attach urbanicity to high-risk pair datasets ---
hr_superfund_urb  <- hr_superfund_pairs  %>% left_join(sites_with_locale_superfund  %>% st_drop_geometry(), by = "SITE_ID")
hr_brownfield_urb <- hr_brownfield_pairs %>% left_join(sites_with_locale_brownfield %>% st_drop_geometry(), by = "SITE_ID")
hr_tri_urb        <- hr_tri_pairs        %>% left_join(sites_with_locale_tri        %>% st_drop_geometry(), by = "SITE_ID")
hr_all_urb        <- hr_all_pairs        %>% left_join(sites_with_locale_all        %>% st_drop_geometry(), by = "SITE_ID")

# --- 5. Urbanicity denominators for high-risk sites ---
hr_denom_superfund <- superfund_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>%
  filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>%
  left_join(sites_with_locale_superfund %>% st_drop_geometry(), by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  count(site_urbanicity, name = "total_sites")

hr_denom_brownfield <- brownfield_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>%
  filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>%
  left_join(sites_with_locale_brownfield %>% st_drop_geometry(), by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  count(site_urbanicity, name = "total_sites")

hr_denom_tri <- tri_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>%
  filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>%
  left_join(sites_with_locale_tri %>% st_drop_geometry(), by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  count(site_urbanicity, name = "total_sites")

hr_denom_all <- all_pollution_highrisk_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>%
  filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>%
  left_join(sites_with_locale_all %>% st_drop_geometry(), by = "SITE_ID") %>%
  count(site_urbanicity, name = "total_sites")

# --- 6. Urbanicity summary ---
distances  <- c("0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi")
hr_results <- list()

for (dist in distances) {
  hr_results[[paste0("Superfund_",           dist)]] <- hr_superfund_urb  %>% filter(buffer_distance == dist) %>% distinct(SITE_ID, site_urbanicity) %>% count(site_urbanicity, name = "sites_near_schools") %>% left_join(hr_denom_superfund,  by = "site_urbanicity") %>% mutate(dataset = "Superfund",          buffer_distance = dist, prop_near = round(sites_near_schools / total_sites, 3))
  hr_results[[paste0("Brownfield_",          dist)]] <- hr_brownfield_urb %>% filter(buffer_distance == dist) %>% distinct(SITE_ID, site_urbanicity) %>% count(site_urbanicity, name = "sites_near_schools") %>% left_join(hr_denom_brownfield, by = "site_urbanicity") %>% mutate(dataset = "Brownfield",         buffer_distance = dist, prop_near = round(sites_near_schools / total_sites, 3))
  hr_results[[paste0("TRI_",                 dist)]] <- hr_tri_urb        %>% filter(buffer_distance == dist) %>% distinct(SITE_ID, site_urbanicity) %>% count(site_urbanicity, name = "sites_near_schools") %>% left_join(hr_denom_tri,        by = "site_urbanicity") %>% mutate(dataset = "TRI",                buffer_distance = dist, prop_near = round(sites_near_schools / total_sites, 3))
  hr_results[[paste0("All Pollution Sites_", dist)]] <- hr_all_urb        %>% filter(buffer_distance == dist) %>% distinct(SITE_ID, site_urbanicity) %>% count(site_urbanicity, name = "sites_near_schools") %>% left_join(hr_denom_all,        by = "site_urbanicity") %>% mutate(dataset = "All Pollution Sites", buffer_distance = dist, prop_near = round(sites_near_schools / total_sites, 3))
}

# --- 7. Pivot wide ---
hr_urbanicity_wide <- bind_rows(hr_results) %>%
  select(dataset, buffer_distance, site_urbanicity, prop_near) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = site_urbanicity, values_from = prop_near) %>%
  select(dataset, buffer_distance, city, suburban, town, rural, `NA`) %>%
  arrange(dataset, buffer_distance)

# --- 8. Join overall and urbanicity into final table ---
table_a10_full <- hr_overall_summary %>%
  left_join(
    hr_urbanicity_wide %>%
      select(dataset, buffer_distance, city, suburban, town, rural),
    by = c("dataset", "buffer_distance")
  ) %>%
  arrange(dataset, buffer_distance)

print(table_a10_full)
write.csv(table_a10_full, "Data/Newly Built/table_a10_full.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# --- Check sites with missing urbanicity for high-risk sites ---
bind_rows(
  hr_denom_superfund  %>% mutate(site_type = "Superfund"),
  hr_denom_brownfield %>% mutate(site_type = "Brownfield"),
  hr_denom_tri        %>% mutate(site_type = "TRI"),
  hr_denom_all        %>% mutate(site_type = "All Pollution Sites")
) %>%
  group_by(site_type) %>%
  summarise(
    total       = sum(total_sites),
    missing     = sum(total_sites[is.na(site_urbanicity)]),
    pct_missing = round(missing / total * 100, 1),
    .groups     = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print()

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Appendix Table A11. School Proximity to All and High-Risk
# Environmental Hazard Sites, by Site Type, Distance, and School Type
# Reports counts and proportions of schools near any pollution site
# and near high-risk sites only, across all site types and distances
# for all schools (public and private combined)
# ============================================================

# --- Helper to build all-sites summary ---
make_allsites_summary <- function(tri_summary, superfund_summary, brownfield_summary, all_summary, n_denom, school_type_label) {
  bind_rows(
    tri_summary$national        %>% mutate(source = "TRI"),
    superfund_summary$national  %>% mutate(source = "Superfund"),
    brownfield_summary$national %>% mutate(source = "Brownfield"),
    all_summary$national        %>% mutate(source = "All Pollution Sites")
  ) %>%
    select(source, buffer_distance, unique_schools, total_intersections) %>%
    mutate(
      prop_unique   = round(unique_schools / n_denom, 2),
      school_type   = school_type_label,
      risk_category = "All Sites"
    )
}

# --- Helper to build high-risk summary ---
make_highrisk_summary <- function(school_level_tri, school_level_superfund, school_level_brownfield, school_level_all, school_type_label) {
  bind_rows(
    school_level_tri        %>% mutate(source = "TRI"),
    school_level_superfund  %>% mutate(source = "Superfund"),
    school_level_brownfield %>% mutate(source = "Brownfield"),
    school_level_all        %>% mutate(source = "All Pollution Sites")
  ) %>%
    filter(any_highrisk == TRUE) %>%
    select(source, buffer_distance, unique_schools = n_schools, prop_unique = prop_schools) %>%
    mutate(
      total_intersections = NA_integer_,
      school_type         = school_type_label,
      risk_category       = "High-Risk Sites"
    )
}

# --- Build summaries for all schools ---
allsites_all  <- make_allsites_summary(tri_all_summary, superfund_all_summary, brownfield_all_summary, all_all_summary, n_all, "All")
highrisk_all  <- make_highrisk_summary(school_level_tri, school_level_superfund, school_level_brownfield, school_level_all, "All")

# --- Combine and export ---
combined_final <- bind_rows(allsites_all, highrisk_all) %>%
  select(school_type, risk_category, source, buffer_distance, unique_schools, prop_unique) %>%
  arrange(school_type, risk_category, source, buffer_distance)

print(combined_final)
write.csv(combined_final, "Data/Newly Built/national_school_pollution_exposure_allsites_highrisk.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Appendix Table A12. Disparity Ratios by Race and Program
# Across All Site Types and Distances, for All and High-Risk Sites
# All schools (public and private combined)
# Extends A3/A5 by breaking out ratios by individual site type
# (Superfund, Brownfield, TRI, All Pollution Sites)
# ============================================================

compute_ratios <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      Distance          = factor(buffer_distance, levels = c("0.125mi", "0.25mi", "0.5mi", "1mi")),
      FRL_vs_NonFRL     = ifelse(school_type == "Public", round(prob_FRL     / prob_NonFRL,  2), NA),
      IDEA_vs_NonIDEA   = ifelse(school_type == "Public", round(prob_IDEA    / prob_NonIDEA, 2), NA),
      EL_vs_NonEL       = ifelse(school_type == "Public", round(prob_EL      / prob_NonEL,   2), NA),
      Black_vs_White    = round(prob_Black    / prob_White, 2),
      Hispanic_vs_White = round(prob_Hispanic / prob_White, 2),
      Native_vs_White   = round(prob_Native   / prob_White, 2),
      Hawaiian_vs_White = round(prob_Hawaiian / prob_White, 2),
      Asian_vs_White    = round(prob_Asian    / prob_White, 2)
    ) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(FRL_vs_NonFRL, IDEA_vs_NonIDEA, EL_vs_NonEL,
               Black_vs_White, Hispanic_vs_White, Native_vs_White,
               Hawaiian_vs_White, Asian_vs_White),
      names_to  = "Comparison",
      values_to = "Prob_Ratio"
    ) %>%
    select(school_type, site_type, Distance, Comparison, Prob_Ratio) %>%
    arrange(school_type, site_type, Distance, Comparison)
}

# --- Compute ratios for all schools combined, both risk categories ---
exposure_ratios    <- combined_all    %>% compute_ratios()
exposure_ratios_hr <- combined_all_hr %>% compute_ratios()

# --- Combine and export ---
exposure_ratios_combined <- bind_rows(
  exposure_ratios    %>% mutate(risk_category = "All Sites"),
  exposure_ratios_hr %>% mutate(risk_category = "High-Risk Sites")
) %>%
  select(school_type, risk_category, site_type, Distance, Comparison, Prob_Ratio) %>%
  arrange(school_type, risk_category, site_type, Distance, Comparison)

print(exposure_ratios_combined)
write.csv(exposure_ratios_combined, "Data/Newly Built/national_school_pollution_exposure_ratios_allsites_highrisk.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Appendix Table A13. Counts of Known Environmental Hazard Sites
# Total and higher-risk site counts by site type
# ============================================================

tibble(
  site_type   = c("Superfund", "Brownfield", "TRI", "All Pollution Sites"),
  all_sites   = c(nrow(superfund_sf), nrow(brownfield_sf), nrow(tri_sf), nrow(all_pollution_sf)),
  higher_risk = c(
    superfund_highrisk_sf  %>% filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>% nrow(),
    brownfield_highrisk_sf %>% filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>% nrow(),
    tri_highrisk_sf        %>% filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>% nrow(),
    all_pollution_highrisk_sf %>% filter(HighRisk_flag == TRUE) %>% nrow()
  )
) %>% print()

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Export All Figures to PDF
# ============================================================

pdf("Figures/Figure_1.pdf", width = 10, height = 7)
print(fig1)
dev.off()

pdf("Figures/Figure_2.pdf", width = 10, height = 7)
print(fig2a)
dev.off()

pdf("Figures/Figure_3.pdf", width = 10, height = 7)
print(fig3)
dev.off()

pdf("Figures/Figure_4.pdf", width = 10, height = 7)
print(fig4)
dev.off()

pdf("Figures/Appendix_Figure_1.pdf", width = 10, height = 7)
print(fig2b)
dev.off()

```
